items.title: R-Pingmesh: A Service-Aware RoCE Network Monitoring and Diagnostic System.
items.abstract:
RoCE services are sensitive to network failures and performance bottlenecks, which become more common as the RoCE network scales. In addition, some non-network problems behave like network problems and can waste troubleshooting time. However, existing mechanisms cannot quickly detect and locate network problems or determine whether the service problem is network-related.

In this paper, we propose R-Pingmesh, the first service-aware RoCE network monitoring and diagnostic system based on end-to-end probing. R-Pingmesh can accurately measure network RTT and end-host processing delay based on commodity RDMA NICs (RNICs), distinguish between RNIC and in-network packet drops, and judge whether a problem is network-related and assess its impact on services. We have deployed R-Pingmesh on tens of thousands of RNICs for over 6 months. One-month evaluation results show that 85% of the problems located by R-Pingmesh are accurate, where all 157 switch network problems are accurate. R-Pingmesh efficiently detects and locates 14 types of problems during deployment, and we share our experience in dealing with them.
items.abstract_zh:
RoCE 服务对网络故障和性能瓶颈很敏感，随着 RoCE 网络的扩展，这种情况变得更加常见。此外，一些非网络问题的行为类似于网络问题，可能会浪费故障排除时间。但现有机制无法快速检测和定位网络问题或判断业务问题是否与网络相关。

在本文中，我们提出了 R-Pingmesh，这是第一个基于端到端探测的服务感知 RoCE 网络监控和诊断系统。 R-Pingmesh可以基于商用RDMA网卡（RNIC）精确测量网络RTT和终端主机处理延迟，区分RNIC和网内丢包，判断问题是否与网络相关并评估其对业务的影响。我们已在数万个 RNIC 上部署 R-Pingmesh 超过 6 个月。一个月的评估结果显示，R-Pingmesh定位的问题准确率达到85%，其中157个交换机网络问题全部准确。 R-Pingmesh高效检测并定位部署过程中的14类问题，并分享处理经验。

items.title: NegotiaToR: Towards A Simple Yet Effective On-demand Reconfigurable Datacenter Network.
items.abstract: Recent advances in fast optical switching technology show promise in meeting the high goodput and low latency requirements of datacenter networks (DCN). We present NegotiaToR, a simple network architecture for optical reconfigurable DCNs that utilizes on-demand scheduling to handle dynamic traffic. In NegotiaToR, racks exchange scheduling messages through an in-band control plane and distributedly calculate non-conflicting paths from binary traffic demand information. Optimized for incasts, it also provides opportunities to bypass scheduling delays. NegotiaToR is compatible with prevalent flat topologies, and is tailored towards a minimalist design for on-demand reconfigurable DCNs, enhancing practicality. Through large-scale simulations, we show that NegotiaToR achieves both small mice flow completion time (FCT) and high goodput on two representative flat topologies, especially under heavy loads. Particularly, the FCT of mice flows is one to two orders of magnitude better than the state-of-the-art traffic-oblivious reconfigurable DCN design.
items.abstract_zh: 快速光交换技术的最新进展有望满足数据中心网络 (DCN) 的高吞吐量和低延迟要求。我们推出 NegotiaToR，这是一种用于光学可重配置 DCN 的简单网络架构，它利用按需调度来处理动态流量。在 NegotiaToR 中，机架通过带内控制平面交换调度消息，并根据二进制流量需求信息分布式计算非冲突路径。它针对直播进行了优化，还提供了绕过调度延迟的机会。 NegotiaToR兼容流行的扁平拓扑，专为按需可重构DCN的极简设计而定制，增强了实用性。通过大规模模拟，我们表明 NegotiaToR 在两种代表性的平面拓扑上实现了小小鼠流完成时间 (FCT) 和高吞吐量，尤其是在重负载下。特别是，小鼠流的 FCT 比最先进的流量无关可重构 DCN 设计好一到两个数量级。

items.title: Fast, Scalable, and Accurate Rate Limiter for RDMA NICs.
items.abstract: RDMA NICs desire a rate limiter that is accurate, scalable, and fast: to precisely enforce the policies such as congestion control and traffic isolation, to support a large number of flows, and to sustain high packet rates. Prior works such as SENIC and PIEO can achieve accuracy and scalability, but they are not fast enough, thus fail to fulfill the performance requirement of RNICs, due primarily to their monolithic design and one-packet-per-sorting transmission. We present Tassel, a hierarchical rate limiter for RDMA NICs that can deliver high packet rates by enabling multiple-packet-per-sorting transmission, while preserving accuracy and scalability. At its heart, Tassel renovates the workflow of the rate limiter hierarchically: by first applying scalable rate limiting to the flows to be scheduled, followed by accurate rate limiting to the packets to be transmitted, while leveraging adaptive batching and packet filtering to improve the performance of these two steps. We integrate Tassel into the RNIC architecture by replacing the original QP scheduler module and implement the prototype of Tassel using FPGA. Experimental results show that Tassel delivers 125 Mpps packet rate, outperforming SENIC and PIEO by 3.6×, while supporting 16 K flows with low resource usage, 7.5% - 25.6% as compared to SENIC and PIEO, and preserving high accuracy, precisely enforcing rate limits from 100 Kbps to 100 Gbps.
items.abstract_zh: RDMA NIC 需要一个准确、可扩展且快速的速率限制器：精确执行拥塞控制和流量隔离等策略，支持大量流并维持高数据包速率。诸如SENIC和PIEO之类的先前工作可以实现准确性和可扩展性，但它们的速度不够快，因此无法满足RNIC的性能要求，这主要是由于它们的单片设计和每次排序一个数据包的传输。我们推出了 Tassel，这是一种用于 RDMA NIC 的分层速率限制器，它可以通过启用每个排序多个数据包传输来提供高数据包速率，同时保持准确性和可扩展性。从本质上讲，Tassel 分层革新了速率限制器的工作流程：首先对要调度的流应用可扩展的速率限制，然后对要传输的数据包进行精确的速率限制，同时利用自适应批处理和数据包过滤来提高这两个步骤的性能。我们通过替换原有的QP调度器模块将Tassel集成到RNIC架构中，并使用FPGA实现了Tassel的原型。实验结果表明，Tassel 可提供 125 Mpps 的数据包速率，性能优于 SENIC 和 PIEO 3.6 倍，同时支持 16 K 流，资源占用率低，与 SENIC 和 PIEO 相比为 7.5% - 25.6%，并保持高精度，精确执行从 100 Kbps 到 100 Gbps 的速率限制。

items.title: Dissecting Carrier Aggregation in 5G Networks: Measurement, QoE Implications and Prediction.
items.abstract: By aggregating multiple channels, Carrier Aggregation (CA) is an important technology for boosting cellular network bandwidth. Given diverse radio bands made available in 5G networks, CA plays a particularly critical role in achieving the goal of multi-Gbps throughput performance. In this paper, we carry out a timely comprehensive measurement study of CA deployment in commercial 5G networks (as well as 4G networks). We identify the key factors that influence whether CA is deployed and when, as well as which band combinations are used. Thus, we reveal the challenges posed by CA in 5G performance analysis and prediction as well as their implications in application quality-of-experience (QoE). We argue for and develop a novel CA-aware deep learning framework, dubbed Prism5G , which explicitly accounts for the complexity introduced by CA to more effectively predict 5G network throughput performance. Through extensive evaluations, we demonstrate the superiority of Prism5G over existing throughput prediction algorithms. Prism5G improves 5G throughput prediction accuracy by over 14% on average and a maximum of 22%. Using two use cases as examples, we further illustrate how Prism5G can aid applications in optimizing QoE performance.
items.abstract_zh: 通过聚合多个信道，载波聚合（CA）是提高蜂窝网络带宽的重要技术。鉴于 5G 网络中提供了多种无线电频段，CA 在实现多 Gbps 吞吐量性能目标方面发挥着特别关键的作用。在本文中，我们对商用5G网络（以及4G网络）中的CA部署进行了及时的综合测量研究。我们确定了影响是否部署 CA、何时部署以及使用哪些频段组合的关键因素。因此，我们揭示了 CA 在 5G 性能分析和预测中带来的挑战及其对应用体验质量 (QoE) 的影响。我们主张并开发一种新颖的 CA 感知深度学习框架，称为 Prism5G，它明确考虑了 CA 引入的复杂性，以更有效地预测 5G 网络吞吐量性能。通过广泛的评估，我们证明了 Prism5G 相对于现有吞吐量预测算法的优越性。 Prism5G 将 5G 吞吐量预测精度平均提高超过 14%，最高提高 22%。我们以两个用例为例，进一步说明 Prism5G 如何帮助应用程序优化 QoE 性能。

items.title: dAuth: A Resilient Authentication Architecture for Federated Private Cellular Networks.
items.abstract: We present dAuth, an approach to device authentication in private cellular networks which refactors the responsibilities of authentication to enable multiple small private cellular networks to federate together to provide a more reliable and resilient service than could be achieved on their own. dAuth is designed to be backwards compatible with off-the-shelf 4G and 5G cellular devices and can be incrementally deployed today. It uses cryptographic secret sharing and a division of concerns between sensitive data stored with backup networks and non-sensitive public directory data to securely scale authentication across multiple redundant nodes operating among different and untrusted organizations. Specifically, it allows a collection of pre-configured backup networks to authenticate users on behalf of their home network while the home network is unavailable. We evaluate dAuth's performance with production equipment from an active federated community network, finding that it is able to work with existing systems. We follow this with an evaluation using a simulated 5G RAN and find that it performs comparably to a standalone cloud-based 5G core at low load, and outperforms a centralized core at high load due to its innate load-sharing properties.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 dAuth，一种专用蜂窝网络中的设备身份验证方法，它重构了身份验证的职责，使多个小型专用蜂窝网络能够联合在一起，提供比单独使用更可靠、更有弹性的服务。 dAuth 旨在向后兼容现成的 4G 和 5G 蜂窝设备，并且现在可以增量部署。它使用加密秘密共享以及备份网络存储的敏感数据和非敏感公共目录数据之间的关注点划分，跨不同且不受信任的组织之间运行的多个冗余节点安全地扩展身份验证。具体来说，它允许一组预配置的备份网络在家庭网络不可用时代表其家庭网络对用户进行身份验证。我们使用活跃的联合社区网络的生产设备评估 dAuth 的性能，发现它能够与现有系统配合使用。我们随后使用模拟 5G RAN 进行了评估，发现它在低负载下的性能与独立的基于云的 5G 核心相当，并且由于其固有的负载共享属性，在高负载下的性能优于集中式核心。

items.title: Transferable Neural WAN TE for Changing Topologies.
items.abstract: Recently, researchers have proposed ML-driven traffic engineering (TE) schemes where a neural network model is used to produce TE decisions in lieu of conventional optimization solvers. Unfortunately existing ML-based TE schemes are not explicitly designed to be robust to topology changes that may occur due to WAN evolution, failures or planned maintenance. In this paper, we present HARP, a neural model for TE explicitly capable of handling variations in topology including those not observed in training. HARP is designed with two principles in mind: (i) ensure invariances to natural input transformations (e.g., permutations of node ids, tunnel reordering); and (ii) align neural architecture to the optimization model. Evaluations on a multi-week dataset of a large private WAN show HARP achieves an MLU at most 11% higher than optimal over 98% of the time despite encountering significantly different topologies in testing relative to training data. Further, comparisons with state-of-the-art ML-based TE schemes indicate the importance of the mechanisms introduced by HARP to handle topology variability. Finally, when predicted traffic matrices are provided, HARP outperforms classic optimization solvers achieving a median reduction in MLU of 5 to 10% on the true traffic matrix.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，研究人员提出了机器学习驱动的流量工程 (TE) 方案，其中使用神经网络模型代替传统的优化求解器来生成 TE 决策。不幸的是，现有的基于 ML 的 TE 方案并未明确设计为能够应对由于 WAN 演进、故障或计划维护而可能发生的拓扑变化。在本文中，我们提出了 HARP，这是一种 TE 的神经模型，能够明确处理拓扑变化，包括那些在训练中未观察到的变化。 HARP 的设计考虑了两个原则：（i）确保自然输入转换的不变性（例如，节点 ID 的排列、隧道重新排序）； (ii) 将神经架构与优化模型对齐。对大型专用 WAN 的多周数据集的评估表明，尽管在测试中遇到了与训练数据显着不同的拓扑，但 HARP 在 98% 的时间内实现的 MLU 最多比最佳值高 11%。此外，与最先进的基于 ML 的 TE 方案的比较表明了 HARP 引入的处理拓扑变化机制的重要性。最后，当提供预测流量矩阵时，HARP 的性能优于经典优化求解器，在真实流量矩阵上实现 MLU 中值降低 5% 到 10%。

items.title: The Next Generation of BGP Data Collection Platforms.
items.abstract: BGP data collection platforms as currently architected face fundamental challenges that threaten their long-term sustainability. Inspired by recent work, we analyze, prototype, and evaluate a new optimization paradigm for BGP collection. Our system scales data collection with two components: analyzing redundancy between BGP updates and using it to optimize sampling of the incoming streams of BGP data. An appropriate definition of redundancy across updates depends on the analysis objective. Our contributions include: a survey, measurements, and simulations to demonstrate the limitations of current systems; a general framework and algorithms to assess and remove redundancy in BGP observations; and quantitative analysis of the benefit of our approach in terms of accuracy and coverage for several canonical BGP routing analyses such as hijack detection and topology mapping. Finally, we implement and deploy a new BGP peering collection system that automates peering expansion using our redundancy analytics, which provides a path forward for more thorough evaluation of this approach.
items.abstract_zh: 目前构建的 BGP 数据收集平台面临着威胁其长期可持续性的根本挑战。受最近工作的启发，我们对 BGP 收集的新优化范例进行了分析、原型设计和评估。我们的系统通过两个组件扩展数据收集：分析 BGP 更新之间的冗余并使用它来优化 BGP 数据传入流的采样。更新之间的冗余的适当定义取决于分析目标。我们的贡献包括：通过调查、测量和模拟来证明当前系统的局限性；用于评估和消除 BGP 观察中的冗余的通用框架和算法；并对我们的方法在几种规范 BGP 路由分析（例如劫持检测和拓扑映射）的准确性和覆盖范围方面的优势进行定量分析。最后，我们实施并部署了一个新的 BGP 对等收集系统，该系统使用我们的冗余分析自动进行对等扩展，这为更彻底地评估此方法提供了一条前进的道路。

items.title: Shale: A Practical, Scalable Oblivious Reconfigurable Network.
items.abstract:
Circuit-switched technologies have long been proposed for handling high-throughput traffic in datacenter networks, but recent developments in nanosecond-scale reconfiguration have created the enticing possibility of handling low-latency traffic as well. The novel Oblivious Reconfigurable Network (ORN) design paradigm promises to deliver on this possibility. Prior work in ORN designs achieved latencies that scale linearly with system size, making them unsuitable for large-scale deployments. Recent theoretical work showed that ORNs can achieve far better latency scaling, proposing theoretical ORN designs that are Pareto optimal in latency and throughput.

In this work, we bridge multiple gaps between theory and practice to develop Shale, the first ORN capable of providing low-latency networking at datacenter scale while still guaranteeing high throughput. By interleaving multiple Pareto optimal schedules in parallel, both latency- and throughput-sensitive flows can achieve optimal performance. To achieve the theoretical low latencies in practice, we design a new congestion control mechanism which is best suited to the characteristics of Shale. In datacenter-scale packet simulations, our design compares favorably with both an in-network congestion mitigation strategy, modern receiver-driven protocols such as NDP, and an idealized analog for sender-driven protocols. We implement an FPGA-based prototype of Shale, achieving orders of magnitude better resource scaling than existing ORN proposals. Finally, we extend our congestion control solution to handle node and link failures.
items.abstract_zh:
电路交换技术长期以来一直被提议用于处理数据中心网络中的高吞吐量流量，但纳秒级重新配置的最新发展也创造了处理低延迟流量的诱人可能性。新颖的不经意可重构网络（ORN）设计范式有望实现这种可能性。 ORN 设计中的先前工作实现了随系统规模线性扩展的延迟，这使得它们不适合大规模部署。最近的理论工作表明，ORN 可以实现更好的延迟扩展，并提出了延迟和吞吐量方面帕累托最优的理论 ORN 设计。

在这项工作中，我们弥合了理论与实践之间的多重差距，开发了 Shale，这是第一个能够在数据中心规模提供低延迟网络同时仍保证高吞吐量的 ORN。通过并行交错多个帕累托最优调度，延迟和吞吐量敏感的流都可以实现最佳性能。为了在实践中实现理论上的低延迟，我们设计了一种最适合Shale特点的新的拥塞控制机制。在数据中心规模的数据包模拟中，我们的设计与网络内拥塞缓解策略、现代接收器驱动协议（例如 NDP）以及发送器驱动协议的理想模拟相比具有优势。我们实现了基于 FPGA 的 Shale 原型，实现了比现有 ORN 提案好几个数量级的资源扩展。最后，我们扩展了拥塞控制解决方案来处理节点和链路故障。

items.title: SUSS: Improving TCP Performance by Speeding Up Slow-Start.
items.abstract: The traditional slow-start mechanism in TCP can result in slow ramping-up of the data delivery rate, inefficient bandwidth utilization, and prolonged completion time for small-size flows, especially in networks with a large bandwidth-delay product ( BDP ). Existing solutions either only work in specific situations, or require network assistance, making them challenging (if even possible) to deploy. This paper presents SUSS (Speeding Up Slow Start): a lightweight, sender-side add-on to the traditional slow-start mechanism, that aims to safely expedite the growth of the congestion window when a flow is significantly below its optimal fair share of the available bandwidth. SUSS achieves this by accelerating the growth in cwnd when exponential growth is predicted to continue in the next round. SUSS employs a novel combination of ACK clocking and packet pacing to effectively mitigate traffic burstiness caused by accelerated increases in cwnd. We have implemented SUSS in the Linux kernel, integrated into the CUBIC congestion control algorithm. Our real-world experiments span many device types and Internet locations, demonstrating that SUSS consistently outperforms traditional slow-start with no measured negative impacts. SUSS achieves over 20% improvement in flow completion time in all experiments with flow sizes less than 5MB and RTT larger than 50 ms.
items.abstract_zh: TCP 中传统的慢启动机制会导致数据传输速率缓慢上升、带宽利用率低下以及小规模流的完成时间延长，尤其是在具有较大带宽延迟积 (BDP) 的网络中。现有的解决方案要么只能在特定情况下工作，要么需要网络帮助，这使得它们的部署具有挑战性（如果可能的话）。本文介绍了 SUSS（加速慢启动）：传统慢启动机制的轻量级发送方附加组件，旨在当流量明显低于其可用带宽的最佳公平份额时，安全地加速拥塞窗口的增长。当预测下一轮将继续呈指数增长时，SUSS 通过加速 cwnd 的增长来实现这一目标。 SUSS 采用 ACK 时钟和数据包调步的新颖组合来有效缓解 cwnd 加速增加引起的流量突发。我们在Linux内核中实现了SUSS，并集成到了CUBIC拥塞控制算法中。我们的现实世界实验涵盖了许多设备类型和互联网位置，证明 SUSS 始终优于传统的慢启动，并且没有测量到负面影响。在流大小小于 5MB 且 RTT 大于 50 ms 的所有实验中，SUSS 的流完成时间提高了 20% 以上。

items.title: TraceWeaver: Distributed Request Tracing for Microservices Without Application Modification.
items.abstract: Monitoring and debugging modern cloud-based applications is challenging since even a single API call can involve many interdependent distributed microservices. To provide observability for such complex systems, distributed tracing frameworks track request flow across the microservice call tree. However, such solutions require instrumenting every component of the distributed application to add and propagate tracing headers, which has slowed adoption. This paper explores whether we can trace requests without any application instrumentation, which we refer to as request trace reconstruction. To that end, we develop TraceWeaver, a system that incorporates readily available information from production settings (e.g., timestamps) and test environments (e.g., call graphs) to reconstruct request traces with usefully high accuracy. At the heart of TraceWeaver is a reconstruction algorithm that uses request-response timestamps to effectively prune the search space for mapping requests and applies statistical timing analysis techniques to reconstruct traces. Evaluation with (1) benchmark microservice applications and (2) a production microservice dataset demonstrates that TraceWeaver can achieve a high accuracy of ~90% and can be meaningfully applied towards multiple use cases (e.g., finding slow services and A/B testing).
items.abstract_zh: 监控和调试基于云的现代应用程序具有挑战性，因为即使是单个 API 调用也可能涉及许多相互依赖的分布式微服务。为了为此类复杂系统提供可观察性，分布式跟踪框架跟踪微服务调用树中的请求流。然而，此类解决方案需要检测分布式应用程序的每个组件以添加和传播跟踪标头，这减缓了采用速度。本文探讨了我们是否可以在没有任何应用程序检测的情况下跟踪请求，我们将其称为请求跟踪重建。为此，我们开发了 TraceWeaver，该系统结合了来自生产设置（例如时间戳）和测试环境（例如调用图）的现成信息，以非常高的准确度重建请求跟踪。 TraceWeaver 的核心是一种重建算法，该算法使用请求-响应时间戳来有效地修剪映射请求的搜索空间，并应用统计时序分析技术来重建跟踪。使用 (1) 基准微服务应用程序和 (2) 生产微服务数据集进行的评估表明，TraceWeaver 可以实现约 90% 的高精度，并且可以有意义地应用于多个用例（例如，查找慢速服务和 A/B 测试）。

items.title: NetEdit: An Orchestration Platform for eBPF Network Functions at Scale.
items.abstract:
Managing the performance of thousands of services across millions of servers demands a networking stack that can dynamically adjust protocol settings to match diverse priorities and network characteristics. Moreover, given the constantly evolving nature of services and their requirements, the set of configurable protocols must remain adaptable. However, current host networking stacks lack the necessary flexibility and adaptability. Although eBPF shows promise in this regard, it lacks essential primitives for efficient development and safe deployment of multiple co-existing services.

This paper presents our experience developing NetEdit, a system that orchestrates the composition, deployment, and life-cycle management of eBPF programs across a large fleet of servers at Meta. Our design offers a unified abstraction for various kernel hookpoints, decouples policies from programs using a rich configuration language, supports explicit object management for reliable deployment and provides extensive testing methods. NetEdit has been deployed in our production network for five years and now supports thirteen Network Function applications. We have observed that NetEdit-enabled functions improve average service performance by 3X and network performance by 4.6X, showcasing its significant real-world impact.
items.abstract_zh:
管理数百万台服务器上数千个服务的性能需要一个网络堆栈，该堆栈可以动态调整协议设置以匹配不同的优先级和网络特征。此外，考虑到服务及其需求不断变化的性质，可配置协议集必须保持适应性。然而，当前的主机网络堆栈缺乏必要的灵活性和适应性。尽管 eBPF 在这方面表现出了希望，但它缺乏高效开发和安全部署多个共存服务的基本原语。

本文介绍了我们开发 NetEdit 的经验，NetEdit 是一个系统，可以在 Meta 的大量服务器上协调 eBPF 程序的组合、部署和生命周期管理。我们的设计为各种内核挂钩点提供了统一的抽象，使用丰富的配置语言将策略与程序解耦，支持显式对象管理以实现可靠的部署，并提供广泛的测试方法。 NetEdit 已在我们的生产网络中部署了五年，现在支持 13 个网络功能应用程序。我们观察到，支持 NetEdit 的功能将平均服务性能提高了 3 倍，网络性能提高了 4.6 倍，展示了其对现实世界的重大影响。

items.title: Principles for Internet Congestion Management.
items.abstract: Given the technical flaws with---and the increasing non-observance of---the TCP-friendliness paradigm, we must rethink how the Internet should manage bandwidth allocation. We explore this question from first principles, but remain within the constraints of the Internet's current architecture and commercial arrangements. We propose a new framework, Recursive Congestion Shares (RCS), that provides bandwidth allocations independent of which congestion control algorithms flows use but consistent with the Internet's economics. We show that RCS achieves this goal using game-theoretic calculations and simulations as well as network emulation.
items.abstract_zh: 鉴于 TCP 友好范式的技术缺陷以及越来越多的不遵守行为，我们必须重新思考互联网应如何管理带宽分配。我们从首要原则出发探讨这个问题，但仍然受到互联网当前架构和商业安排的限制。我们提出了一个新的框架，即递归拥塞共享（RCS），它提供独立于拥塞控制算法流使用的带宽分配，但与互联网的经济一致。我们证明 RCS 使用博弈论计算和模拟以及网络仿真实现了这一目标。

items.title: An Architecture For Edge Networking Services.
items.abstract: The layered Internet architecture, while far from perfect, has provided a global and neutral platform for the development of a wide range of applications. However, this core architecture has been increasingly augmented with additional in-network functionality that improves the performance, security, and privacy of these applications. These additional in-network functions, which are typically implemented at the network edge, are consistent with the layering of the Internet architecture but deviate from two of the core tenets of the Internet: interconnection and end-to-end simplicity. In this paper, we propose an architecture for these edge networking services called the InterEdge that applies these two Internet tenets in a manner appropriate to edge services while not requiring changes to the underlying Internet architecture or infrastructure.
items.abstract_zh: 分层的互联网架构虽然远非完美，但为各种应用程序的开发提供了一个全球性的、中立的平台。然而，这个核心架构已经越来越多地通过额外的网络内功能进行增强，从而提高了这些应用程序的性能、安全性和隐私性。这些额外的网内功能通常在网络边缘实现，与互联网架构的分层一致，但偏离了互联网的两个核心原则：互连和端到端简单性。在本文中，我们为这些边缘网络服务提出了一种称为 InterEdge 的架构，该架构以适合边缘服务的方式应用这两个互联网原则，同时不需要更改底层互联网架构或基础设施。

items.title: Crux: GPU-Efficient Communication Scheduling for Deep Learning Training.
items.abstract: Deep learning training (DLT), e.g. , large language model (LLM) training, has become one of the most important services in multitenant cloud computing. By deeply studying in-production DLT jobs, we observed that communication contention among different DLT jobs seriously influences the overall GPU computation utilization, resulting in the low efficiency of the training cluster. In this paper, we present Crux, a communication scheduler that aims to maximize GPU computation utilization by mitigating the communication contention among DLT jobs. Maximizing GPU computation utilization for DLT, nevertheless, is NP-Complete; thus, we formulate and prove a novel theorem to approach this goal by GPU intensity -aware communication scheduling. Then, we propose an approach that prioritizes the DLT flows with high GPU computation intensity, reducing potential communication contention. Our 96-GPU testbed experiments show that Crux improves 8.3% to 14.8% GPU computation utilization. The large-scale production trace-based simulation further shows that Crux increases GPU computation utilization by up to 23% compared with alternatives including Sincronia, TACCL, and CASSINI.
items.abstract_zh: 深度学习训练（DLT），例如大语言模型（LLM）训练，已经成为多租户云计算中最重要的服务之一。通过深入研究生产中的 DLT 作业，我们发现不同 DLT 作业之间的通信竞争严重影响整体 GPU 计算利用率，导致训练集群效率低下。在本文中，我们提出了 Crux，一种通信调度程序，旨在通过减轻 DLT 作业之间的通信争用来最大化 GPU 计算利用率。然而，最大化 DLT 的 GPU 计算利用率是 NP 完全的；因此，我们制定并证明了一个新颖的定理，通过 GPU 强度感知的通信调度来实现这一目标。然后，我们提出了一种方法，优先考虑具有高 GPU 计算强度的 DLT 流，从而减少潜在的通信争用。我们的 96-GPU 测试台实验表明，Crux 将 GPU 计算利用率提高了 8.3% 至 14.8%。基于大规模生产跟踪的模拟进一步表明，与 Sincronia、TACCL 和 CASSINI 等替代方案相比，Crux 将 GPU 计算利用率提高了 23%。

items.title: Ten years of the Venezuelan crisis - An Internet perspective.
items.abstract:
The Venezuelan crisis, unfolding over the past decade, has garnered international attention due to its impact on various sectors of civil society. While studies have extensively covered the crisis's effects on public health, energy, and water management, this paper delves into a previously unexplored area - the impact on Venezuela's Internet infrastructure. Amidst Venezuela's multifaceted challenges, understanding the repercussions of this critical aspect of modern society becomes imperative for the country's recovery.

Leveraging measurements from various sources, we present a comprehensive view of the changes undergone by the Venezuelan network in the past decade. Our study reveals the significant impact of the crisis captured by different signals, including bandwidth stagnation, limited growth on network infrastructure growth, and high latency compared to the Latin American average. Beyond offering a new perspective on the Venezuelan crisis, our study can help inform attempts at devising strategies for its recovery.
items.abstract_zh:
过去十年来发生的委内瑞拉危机因其对民间社会各个部门的影响而引起了国际社会的关注。虽然研究广泛涵盖了这场危机对公共卫生、能源和水管理的影响，但本文深入探讨了一个以前未探索过的领域——对委内瑞拉互联网基础设施的影响。在委内瑞拉面临的多方面挑战中，了解现代社会这一关键方面的影响对于该国的复苏至关重要。

利用各种来源的测量结果，我们全面了解了委内瑞拉网络在过去十年中所经历的变化。我们的研究揭示了不同信号捕获的危机的重大影响，包括带宽停滞、网络基础设施增长有限以及与拉丁美洲平均水平相比的高延迟。除了提供关于委内瑞拉危机的新视角之外，我们的研究还可以帮助为制定其复苏战略的尝试提供信息。

items.title: OptimusPrime: Unleash Dataplane Programmability through a Transformable Architecture.
items.abstract: Network dataplane calls for better programmability. Current programmable network processing chips are based on either pipeline or multi-core Run-To-Completion (RTC) architecture with various trade-offs in flexibility, performance, and cost. The existing attempts to amalgamate the strengths of the two are stilted and inflexible. In this paper, we challenge the status quo by introducing a more fluid and organic programmable chip architecture, OptimusPrime , built from identical hardware blocks. Unlike the conventional static hybrid architecture, OptimusPrime allows each block to be transformed into either a pipeline stage processor or a multi-core RTC processor through software-defined configuration, enabling versatile data plane programming tailored to a wide range of applications (e.g., stateful packet processing and in-network computing). We integrate the C and P4 languages for application programming and develop algorithms to map a user program to the optimal distribution of pipeline stages and RTC cores. We demonstrate the viability of OptimusPrime through practical use cases such as in-network aggregation, in-network caching, and network function integration. We developed an FPGA-based prototype and a software-based ASIC simulator to validate the feasibility of OptimusPrime , which can be used by switches and smartNICs to enhance their programmability to a new level with high performance and low cost.
items.abstract_zh: 网络数据平面需要更好的可编程性。当前的可编程网络处理芯片基于管道或多核运行到完成 (RTC) 架构，在灵活性、性能和成本方面进行了各种权衡。现有的融合两者优势的尝试是生硬且缺乏灵活性的。在本文中，我们通过引入一种更流畅、更有机的可编程芯片架构 OptimusPrime（由相同的硬件模块构建）来挑战现状。与传统的静态混合架构不同，OptimusPrime 允许通过软件定义的配置将每个模块转换为流水线级处理器或多核 RTC 处理器，从而实现针对各种应用（例如有状态数据包处理和网络内计算）量身定制的通用数据平面编程。我们集成 C 和 P4 语言进行应用程序编程，并开发算法将用户程序映射到管道阶段和 RTC 内核的最佳分布。我们通过网络内聚合、网络内缓存和网络功能集成等实际用例证明了 OptimusPrime 的可行性。我们开发了基于FPGA的原型和基于软件的ASIC模拟器来验证OptimusPrime的可行性，它可以被交换机和smartNIC使用，以高性能和低成本将其可编程性提高到新的水平。

items.title: SODA: An Adaptive Bitrate Controller for Consistent High-Quality Video Streaming.
items.abstract: The primary objective of adaptive bitrate (ABR) streaming is to enhance users' quality of experience (QoE) by dynamically adjusting the video bitrate in response to changing network conditions. However, users often find frequent bitrate switching frustrating due to the resulting inconsistency in visual quality over time, especially during live streaming when buffer lengths are short. In this paper, we propose a practical smoothness optimized dynamic adaptive (SODA) controller that specifically addresses this problem while remaining deployable. SODA is backed by theoretical guarantees and has shown superior performance in empirical evaluations. Specifically, our numerical simulations show a 9.55% to 27.8% QoE improvement and our prototype evaluation shows a 30.4% QoE improvement compared to the state-of-the-art baselines. In order to be widely deployable, SODA performs bitrate horizon planning in polynomial time compared to brute force approaches that suffer from exponential complexity. To demonstrate its real-world practicality, we deployed SODA on a wide range of devices within the production network of Amazon Prime Video. Production experiments show that SODA reduced bitrate switching by up to 88.8% and increased average stream viewing duration by up to 5.91% compared to a fine-tuned production baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 自适应比特率 (ABR) 流媒体的主要目标是通过动态调整视频比特率来响应不断变化的网络条件，从而提高用户的体验质量 (QoE)。然而，用户经常发现频繁的比特率切换令人沮丧，因为随着时间的推移，视觉质量会不一致，尤其是在缓冲区长度较短的直播过程中。在本文中，我们提出了一种实用的平滑度优化动态自适应（SODA）控制器，专门解决这个问题，同时保持可部署性。 SODA 有理论保证，并在实证评估中表现出优越的性能。具体来说，我们的数值模拟显示 QoE 提高了 9.55% 至 27.8%，我们的原型评估显示与最先进的基准相比 QoE 提高了 30.4%。为了广泛部署，SODA 在多项式时间内执行比特率水平规划，而暴力方法则具有指数复杂性。为了展示其现实世界的实用性，我们在 Amazon Prime Video 制作网络内的各种设备上部署了 SODA。生产实验表明，与微调的生产基准相比，SODA 将比特率切换减少了高达 88.8%，并将平均流观看持续时间延长了高达 5.91%。

items.title: YuanRong: A Production General-purpose Serverless System for Distributed Applications in the Cloud.
items.abstract: We design, implement, and evaluate YuanRong , the first production general-purpose serverless platform with a unified programming interface, multi-language runtime, and a distributed computing kernel for cloud-based applications. YuanRong addresses many limitations of existing Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) systems, particularly in performance and lack of important features. First, our fast function system supports sub-millisecond function invocation and locality-aware hierarchical scheduling. Second, our multi-semantic built-in data system achieves object exchange latency of 200 microseconds, enabling end-to-end latency of 2 milliseconds for streaming elements at 5Gbps throughput. Third, the extensible, portable Service Bridge bridges stateless and stateful operations, allowing connection reuse and distributed transactions, and offers unified backend abstraction for multi-cloud portability. YuanRong has been deployed for over 3 years at Huawei across nearly 20 datacenter regions, processing up to 30 billion requests per day on more than 100,000 CPU cores, with a daily average CPU usage of 53%. It serves various serverless workloads, including enhanced FaaS services, microservices, data analytics, deep model training and serving, and some HPC workloads. Our experience shows that Spring-based microservices can be migrated to YuanRong within one day, reducing resource costs by 90%, demonstrating its generality and efficiency in supporting a broad spectrum of applications.
items.abstract_zh: 我们设计、实现和评估YuanRong，这是第一个生产通用无服务器平台，具有统一的编程接口、多语言运行时和基于云的应用程序的分布式计算内核。 YuanRong 解决了现有功能即服务 (FaaS) 系统的许多限制，特别是在性能和​​缺乏重要功能方面。首先，我们的快速函数系统支持亚毫秒级函数调用和局部感知分层调度。其次，我们的多语义内置数据系统实现了 200 微秒的对象交换延迟，从而使 5Gbps 吞吐量下的流元素的端到端延迟为 2 毫秒。第三，可扩展、可移植的服务桥桥接无状态和有状态操作，允许连接重用和分布式事务，并为多云可移植性提供统一的后端抽象。元融已在华为近20个数据中心区域部署超过3年，每天在超过10万个CPU核心上处理高达300亿个请求，日均CPU使用率达到53%。它为各种无服务器工作负载提供服务，包括增强的 FaaS 服务、微服务、数据分析、深度模型训练和服务以及一些 HPC 工作负载。我们的经验表明，基于Spring的微服务一天之内就能迁移到源融，资源成本降低了90%，体现了其对广泛应用的通用性和高效性。

items.title: Eagle: Toward Scalable and Near-Optimal Network-Wide Sketch Deployment in Network Measurement.
items.abstract: Sketches are useful for network measurement thanks to their low resource overheads and theoretically bounded accuracy. However, their network-wide deployment suffers from the trade-off between optimality and scalability: (1) Most solutions rely on mixed integer linear programming (MILP) solvers to provide the optimal decisions. But they are time-consuming and can hardly scale to large-scale deployment scenarios. (2) While heuristics achieve scalability, they deteriorate resource and performance overheads. We propose Eagle, a framework that achieves scalable and near-optimal network-wide sketch deployment. Our key idea is to decompose network-wide sketch deployment into sub-problems. Such decomposition allows Eagle to (1) simultaneously optimize switch resource consumption and end-to-end performance (retaining optimality), and (2) incorporate time-saving techniques into sub-problem solving (achieving scalability). Compared to existing solutions, Eagle improves scalability by up to 255× with negligible loss of optimality. It has also saved administrators in a production network days of efforts and reduced the operation time from O (hour) to O (second).
items.abstract_zh: 草图对于网络测量非常有用，因为它们的资源开销较低且理论上有一定的精度。然而，它们的网络范围部署面临着最优性和可扩展性之间的权衡：（1）大多数解决方案依赖混合整数线性规划（MILP）求解器来提供最优决策。但它们非常耗时，并且很难扩展到大规模部署场景。 (2) 虽然启发式方法实现了可扩展性，但它们会恶化资源和性能开销。我们提出了 Eagle，这是一个实现可扩展且近乎最佳的网络范围草图部署的框架。我们的关键思想是将网络范围的草图部署分解为子问题。这种分解使 Eagle 能够 (1) 同时优化交换机资源消耗和端到端性能（保持最优性），以及 (2) 将节省时间的技术纳入子问题解决中（实现可扩展性）。与现有解决方案相比，Eagle 将可扩展性提高了 255 倍，而最优性的损失可以忽略不计。它还为生产网络中的管理员节省了几天的精力，并将操作时间从O（小时）缩短到O（秒）。

items.title: RD-Probe: Scalable Monitoring With Sufficient Coverage In Complex Datacenter Networks.
items.abstract:
Ensuring service availability in large-scale datacenters hinges on network monitoring. For monitoring quality, it is essential to attain sufficient coverage of all physical components. However, given the ever-evolving complexity of industrial environments, even measuring coverage metrics becomes challenging, let alone attaining sufficient coverage. In fact, insufficient coverage widely existed in our production datacenters and caused many missed failures.

To address this, we design RD-Probe, an industrial monitoring system with coverage and scalability guarantees. Specifically, it first constructs a network topology encoding the industrial complexity. Then, it combines Randomized and Deterministic methods to efficiently generate probe tasks that meet the coverage requirement.

We have deployed RD-Probe in three large production regions in Huawei Cloud. Within the first month, RD-Probe improved coverage from 80.9% to 99.5% and unearthed several previously unnoticed issues while tolerating numerous faults. Large-scale simulation of four industry solutions shows that RD-Probe is the only one achieving both sufficient coverage and scalability in complex datacenter networks. We plan to expand RD-Probe to other regions soon.
items.abstract_zh:
确保大规模数据中心的服务可用性取决于网络监控。为了监控质量，必须充分覆盖所有物理组件。然而，鉴于工业环境不断变化的复杂性，即使测量覆盖率指标也变得具有挑战性，更不用说获得足够的覆盖率了。事实上，我们的生产数据中心广泛存在覆盖不足的问题，并导致了许​​多漏检的故障。

为了解决这个问题，我们设计了RD-Probe，这是一种具有覆盖范围和可扩展性保证的工业监控系统。具体来说，它首先构建一个编码工业复杂性的网络拓扑。然后，它结合随机和确定性方法，有效生成满足覆盖要求的探测任务。

我们在华为云的三个大型生产区域部署了RD-Probe。在第一个月内，RD-Probe 将覆盖率从 80.9% 提高到 99.5%，并在容忍大量故障的同时发现了一些以前未被注意到的问题。对四种行业解决方案的大规模仿真表明，RD-Probe是唯一在复杂数据中心网络中同时实现足够覆盖和可扩展性的解决方案。我们计划很快将 RD-Probe 扩展到其他地区。

items.title: Unveiling the 5G Mid-Band Landscape: From Network Deployment to Performance and Application QoE.
items.abstract: 5G in mid-bands has become the dominant deployment of choice in the world. We present - to the best of our knowledge - the first comprehensive and comparative cross-country measurement study of commercial mid-band 5G deployments in Europe and the U.S., filling a gap in the existing 5G measurement studies. We unveil the key 5G mid-band channels and configuration parameters used by various operators in these countries, and identify the major factors that impact the observed 5G performance both from the network (physical layer) perspective as well as the application perspective. We characterize and compare 5G mid-band throughput and latency performance by dissecting the 5G configurations, lower-layer parameters as well as deployment settings. By cross-correlating 5G parameters with the application decision process, we demonstrate how 5G parameters affect application QoE metrics and suggest a simple approach for QoE enhancement. Our study sheds light on how to better configure and optimize 5G mid-band networks, and provides guidance to users and application developers on operator choices and application QoE tuning. We released the datasets and artifacts at https://github.com/SIGCOMM24-5GinMidBands/artifacts.
items.abstract_zh: 中频段 5G 已成为全球主要部署选择。据我们所知，我们首次对欧洲和美国的商业中频 5G 部署进行了全面、比较的跨国测量研究，填补了现有 5G 测量研究的空白。我们揭示了这些国家各运营商使用的关键 5G 中频信道和配置参数，并从网络（物理层）角度和应用角度确定了影响所观察到的 5G 性能的主要因素。我们通过剖析 5G 配置、底层参数以及部署设置来表征和比较 5G 中带吞吐量和延迟性能。通过将 5G 参数与应用决策过程交叉关联，我们演示了 5G 参数如何影响应用 QoE 指标，并提出了一种增强 QoE 的简单方法。我们的研究揭示了如何更好地配置和优化 5G 中频网络，并为用户和应用程序开发人员提供运营商选择和应用程序 QoE 调整方面的指导。我们在 https://github.com/SIGCOMM24-5GinMidBands/artifacts 上发布了数据集和工件。

items.title: RDMA over Ethernet for Distributed Training at Meta Scale.
items.abstract:
The rapid growth in both computational density and scale in AI models in recent years motivates the construction of an efficient and reliable dedicated network infrastructure. This paper presents the design, implementation, and operation of Meta's Remote Direct Memory Access over Converged Ethernet (RoCE) networks for distributed AI training.

Our design principles involve a deep understanding of the workloads, and we translated these insights into the design of various network components: Network Topology - To support the rapid evolution of generations of AI hardware platforms, we separated GPU-based training into its own "backend" network. Routing - Training workloads inherently impose load imbalance and burstiness, so we deployed several iterations of routing schemes to achieve near-optimal traffic distribution. Transport - We outline how we initially attempted to use DCQCN for congestion management but then pivoted away from DCQCN to instead leverage the collective library itself to manage congestion. Operations - We share our experience operating large-scale AI networks, including toolings we developed and troubleshooting examples.
items.abstract_zh:
近年来，人工智能模型计算密度和规模的快速增长推动了高效可靠的专用网络基础设施的建设。本文介绍了用于分布式 AI 训练的 Meta 融合以太网远程直接内存访问 (RoCE) 网络的设计、实现和操作。

我们的设计原则涉及对工作负载的深入理解，并将这些见解转化为各种网络组件的设计： 网络拓扑 - 为了支持几代人工智能硬件平台的快速发展，我们将基于 GPU 的训练分离到自己的“后端”网络中。路由 - 训练工作负载本质上会带来负载不平衡和突发性，因此我们部署了多次迭代的路由方案以实现近乎最佳的流量分配。传输 - 我们概述了我们最初如何尝试使用 DCQCN 进行拥塞管理，但后来从 DCQCN 转向利用集体库本身来管理拥塞。运营 - 我们分享运营大规模人工智能网络的经验，包括我们开发的工具和故障排除示例。

items.title: Bad Packets Come Back, Worse Ones Don't.
items.abstract:
ISPs may notice that traffic from certain sources is entering their network at an unexpected location, but it is hard to know if this represents a problem or is just normal spoofed background noise. If such traffic is not spoofed, it would be useful to generate alerts, but alerting on background noise is not useful.

We describe Penny, a test ISPs can run to tell unspoofed traffic aggregates arriving on the wrong port from spoofed ones. The idea is simple: when receiving new traffic at unexpected routers, drop a few TCP packets. Non-spoofed TCP packets ("bad packets") will be retransmitted while spoofed ones ("worse packets") will not. However, building a robust test on top of this simple idea is subtle. We show how to deal with conflicting goals: minimizing performance degradation for legitimate flows, dealing with external conditions such as path changes and remote packet loss, and ensuring robustness against spoofers trying to evade our test.
items.abstract_zh:
ISP 可能会注意到来自某些来源的流量正在意外位置进入其网络，但很难知道这是否代表问题或只是正常的欺骗性背景噪音。如果此类流量未被欺骗，则生成警报将很有用，但针对背景噪音发出警报是没有用的。

我们描述了 Penny，这是 ISP 可以运行的一个测试，可以区分到达错误端口的未欺骗流量聚合和欺骗流量聚合。这个想法很简单：当在意外的路由器上接收到新流量时，丢弃一些 TCP 数据包。非欺骗性 TCP 数据包（“坏数据包”）将被重新传输，而欺骗性 TCP 数据包（“更糟糕的数据包”）则不会。然而，在这个简单的想法之上构建一个强大的测试是很微妙的。我们展示了如何处理相互冲突的目标：最大限度地减少合法流的性能下降，处理路径更改和远程数据包丢失等外部条件，并确保针对试图逃避我们测试的欺骗者的鲁棒性。

items.title: Zoom2Net: Constrained Network Telemetry Imputation.
items.abstract: Fine-grained monitoring is crucial for multiple data-driven tasks such as debugging, provisioning, and securing networks. Yet, practical constraints in collecting, extracting, and storing data often force operators to use coarse-grained sampled monitoring, degrading the performance of the various tasks. In this work, we explore the feasibility of leveraging the correlations among coarse-grained time series to impute their fine-grained counterparts in software. We present Zoom2Net, a transformer-based model for network imputation that incorporates domain knowledge through operational and measurement constraints, ensuring that the imputed network telemetry time series are not only realistic but align with existing measurements. This approach enhances the capabilities of current monitoring infrastructures, allowing operators to gain more insights into system behaviors without the need for hardware upgrades. We evaluate Zoom2Net on four diverse datasets ( e.g. , cloud telemetry and Internet data transfer) and use cases ( e.g. , bursts analysis and traffic classification). We demonstrate that Zoom2Net consistently achieves high imputation accuracy with a zoom-in factor of up to 100 and performs better on downstream tasks compared to baselines by an average of 38%.
items.abstract_zh: 细粒度监控对于调试、配置和保护网络等多种数据驱动任务至关重要。然而，收集、提取和存储数据的实际限制常常迫使操作员使用粗粒度的采样监控，从而降低了各种任务的性能。在这项工作中，我们探索了利用粗粒度时间序列之间的相关性来估算软件中细粒度时间序列的可行性。我们提出了 Zoom2Net，一种基于变压器的网络插补模型，它通过操作和测量约束结合了领域知识，确保插补的网络遥测时间序列不仅真实，而且与现有测量保持一致。这种方法增强了当前监控基础设施的功能，使操作员能够更深入地了解系统行为，而无需升级硬件。我们在四个不同的数据集（例如云遥测和互联网数据传输）和用例（例如突发分析和流量分类）上评估 Zoom2Net。我们证明 Zoom2Net 始终能够实现高插补精度，放大系数高达 100，并且在下游任务上的表现比基线平均提高 38%。

items.title: RedTE: Mitigating Subsecond Traffic Bursts with Real-time and Distributed Traffic Engineering.
items.abstract:
Internet traffic bursts usually happen within a second, thus conventional burst mitigation methods ignore the potential of Traffic Engineering (TE). However, our experiments indicate that a TE system, with a sub-second control loop latency, can effectively alleviate burst-induced congestion. TE-based methods can leverage network-wide tunnel-level information to make globally informed decisions ( e.g. , balancing traffic bursts among multiple paths). Our insight in reducing control loop latency is to let each router make local TE decisions, but this introduces the key challenge of minimizing performance loss compared to centralized TE systems.

In this paper, we present RedTE, a novel distributed TE system with a control loop latency of < 100 ms , while achieving performance comparable to centralized TE systems. RedTE's innovation is the modeling of TE as a distributed cooperative multi-agent problem, and we design a novel multi-agent deep reinforcement learning algorithm to solve it, which enables each agent to make globally informed decisions solely based on local information. We implement real RedTE routers and deploy them on a WAN spanning six city datacenters. Evaluation reveals notable improvements compared to existing solutions: < 100 ms of control loop latency, a 37.4% reduction in maximum link utilization, and a 78.9% reduction in average queue length.
items.abstract_zh:
互联网流量突发通常在一秒钟内发生，因此传统的突发缓解方法忽略了流量工程（TE）的潜力。然而，我们的实验表明，具有亚秒级控制环路延迟的 TE 系统可以有效缓解突发引起的拥塞。基于 TE 的方法可以利用全网络隧道级信息来做出全局明智的决策（例如，平衡多条路径之间的流量突发）。我们对减少控制环路延迟的见解是让每个路由器做出本地 TE 决策，但这带来了与集中式 TE 系统相比最小化性能损失的关键挑战。

在本文中，我们提出了 RedTE，这是一种新型分布式 TE 系统，其控制循环延迟< 100 ms，同时实现了与集中式 TE 系统相当的性能。 RedTE 的创新之处在于将 TE 建模为分布式协作多智能体问题，并设计了一种新颖的多智能体深度强化学习算法来解决该问题，该算法使每个智能体能够仅根据本地信息做出全局明智的决策。我们实施真正的 RedTE 路由器并将其部署在跨越六个城市数据中心的 WAN 上。评估显示，与现有解决方案相比，有显着改进：控制循环延迟小于 100 毫秒，最大链路利用率减少 37.4%，平均队列长度减少 78.9%。

items.title: Turbo: Efficient Communication Framework for Large-scale Data Processing Cluster.
items.abstract: Big data processing clusters are suffering from a long job completion time due to the inefficient utilization of the RDMA capability. Our production measurement results in a large-scale cluster with hundreds of server nodes to process large-scale jobs have shown that the existing deployment of RDMA technique results in a long-tail job completion time, with some jobs even taking up more than twice the average time to complete. In this paper, we present the design and implementation of Turbo, an efficient communication framework for the large-scale data processing cluster to achieve high performance and scalability. The core of Turbo's approach is to leverage a dynamic block-level flowlet transmission mechanism and a non-blocking communication middleware to improve the network throughput and enhance system's scalability. Furthermore, Turbo ensures high system reliability by utilizing an external shuffle service as well as TCP serving as a backup. We integrate Turbo into Apache Spark and evaluate Turbo in a small-scale testbed and a large-scale cluster consisting of hundreds of server nodes. The small-scale testbed evaluation results show that Turbo improves the network throughput by 15.1% while maintaining high system reliability. The large-scale production results have shown Turbo can reduce the job completion time by 23.9% and increase the job completion rate by 2.03× over the existing RDMA solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 由于RDMA能力的利用效率低下，大数据处理集群面临着作业完成时间过长的问题。我们在具有数百个服务器节点的大规模集群上处理大规模作业的生产测量结果表明，现有的 RDMA 技术部署会导致作业完成时间长尾，有些作业甚至需要花费平均时间的两倍以上才能完成。在本文中，我们介绍了Turbo的设计和实现，Turbo是一种高效的通信框架，用于大规模数据处理集群以实现高性能和可扩展性。 Turbo方法的核心是利用动态块级Flowlet传输机制和非阻塞通信中间件来提高网络吞吐量并增强系统的可扩展性。此外，Turbo 通过利用外部 shuffle 服务以及 TCP 作为备份来确保系统的高可靠性。我们将 Turbo 集成到 Apache Spark 中，并在小型测试台和由数百个服务器节点组成的大型集群中评估 Turbo。小规模测试床评估结果表明，Turbo在保持系统高可靠性的同时，使网络吞吐量提高了15.1%。大规模生产结果表明，与现有RDMA解决方案相比，Turbo可以将作业完成时间缩短23.9%，并将作业完成率提高2.03倍。

items.title: A Decentralized SDN Architecture for the WAN.
items.abstract: Motivated by our experiences operating a global WAN, we argue that SDN's reliance on infrastructure external to the data plane has substantially complicated the challenge of maintaining high availability. We propose a new decentralized SDN (dSDN) architecture in which SDN control logic instead runs within routers, eliminating the control plane's reliance on external infrastructure and restoring fate-sharing between control and data planes. We present dSDN as a simpler approach to realizing the benefits of SDN in the WAN. Despite its much simpler design, we show that dSDN is practical from an implementation viewpoint, and outperforms centralized SDN in terms of routing convergence and SLO impact.
items.abstract_zh: 受我们运营全球 WAN 经验的启发，我们认为 SDN 对数据平面外部基础设施的依赖使维护高可用性的挑战变得更加复杂。我们提出了一种新的去中心化SDN（dSDN）架构，其中SDN控制逻辑在路由器内运行，消除了控制平面对外部基础设施的依赖，并恢复了控制平面和数据平面之间的命运共享。我们将 dSDN 作为一种在 WAN 中实现 SDN 优势的更简单方法。尽管设计简单得多，但我们表明 dSDN 从实施角度来看是实用的，并且在路由收敛和 SLO 影响方面优于集中式 SDN。

items.title: Topaz: Declarative and Verifiable Authoritative DNS at CDN-Scale.
items.abstract:
Today, when a CDN nameserver receives a DNS query for a customer's domain, it decides which CDN IP to return based on servicelevel objectives such as managing load or maintaining performance, but also internal needs like split testing. Many of these decisions are made a priori by assignment systems that imperatively generate maps from DNS query to IP address(es). Unfortunately, imperative assignments obfuscate nameserver behavior, especially when different objectives conflict.

In this paper we present Topaz, a new authoritative nameserver architecture for anycast CDNs which encodes DNS objectives as declarative, modular programs called policies. Nameservers execute policies directly in response to live queries. To understand or change DNS behavior, operators simply read or modify the list of policy programs. In addition, because policies are written in a formally-verified domain-specific language (topaz-lang), Topaz can detect policy conflicts before deployment. Topaz handles ~1M DNS queries per second at a global CDN, dynamically deciding addresses for millions of names on six continents. We evaluate Topaz and show that the latency overheads it introduces are acceptable.
items.abstract_zh:
如今，当 CDN 名称服务器收到对客户域的 DNS 查询时，它会根据服务级别目标（例如管理负载或维护性能）以及内部需求（例如拆分测试）来决定返回哪个 CDN IP。其中许多决策都是由分配系统先验做出的，这些系统强制生成从 DNS 查询到 IP 地址的映射。不幸的是，命令式分配会混淆名称服务器的行为，尤其是当不同的目标发生冲突时。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Topaz，这是一种用于选播 CDN 的新权威名称服务器架构，它将 DNS 目标编码为称为策略的声明性模块化程序。名称服务器直接执行策略来响应实时查询。要了解或更改 DNS 行为，运营商只需读取或修改策略程序列表即可。此外，由于策略是用经过正式验证的特定于域的语言 (topaz-lang) 编写的，因此 Topaz 可以在部署之前检测到策略冲突。 Topaz 在全球 CDN 上每秒处理约 100 万个 DNS 查询，动态确定六大洲数百万个名称的地址。我们评估了 Topaz 并表明它引入的延迟开销是可以接受的。

items.title: Uniform-Cost Multi-Path Routing for Reconfigurable Data Center Networks.
items.abstract: Reconfigurable data center networks (RDCNs) are arising as a promising data center network (DCN) design in the post-Moore's law era. However, the constantly reconfigured network topology in RDCNs invalidates the assumption of using hop count as the cost metric for routing, e.g., the status quo Equal-Cost Multi-Path routing (ECMP) in traditional DCNs. Unfortunately, existing routing solutions in RDCNs stick to the old assumption and deliver suboptimal performance either high in latency or low in bandwidth efficiency. In this paper, we redefine the cost metric for RDCN routing with uniform cost to unify the effects of topology disruption and hop count on latency and bandwidth efficiency. We propose Uniform-Cost Multi-Path routing (UCMP), an ECMP equivalent for RDCNs, where minimizing uniform cost leads flows of various sizes to the right balance between latency and bandwidth efficiency. Our simulation shows that UCMP achieves 53% to 98% lower flow completion time (FCT) and 1.55× bandwidth efficiency compared to the state-of-the-art RDCN routing strategy, and our testbed implementation demonstrates sustainable switch resource usage of UCMP as RDCNs scale.
items.abstract_zh: 可重构数据中心网络（RDCN）作为后摩尔定律时代一种有前景的数据中心网络（DCN）设计而兴起。然而，RDCN 中不断重新配置的网络拓扑使得使用跳数作为路由成本度量的假设失效，例如传统 DCN 中现状的等成本多路径路由 (ECMP)。不幸的是，RDCN 中现有的路由解决方案仍然坚持旧的假设，并且提供的性能不是最优的，要么延迟高，要么带宽效率低。在本文中，我们以统一的成本重新定义了 RDCN 路由的成本度量，以统一拓扑破坏和跳数对延迟和带宽效率的影响。我们提出了统一成本多路径路由（UCMP），这是 RDCN 的等效 ECMP，其中最小化统一成本导致各种大小的流量在延迟和带宽效率之间达到适当的平衡。我们的模拟表明，与最先进的 RDCN 路由策略相比，UCMP 的流量完成时间 (FCT) 降低了 53% 至 98%，带宽效率降低了 1.55 倍，并且我们的测试台实施证明了 UCMP 随着 RDCN 规模的可持续交换机资源使用。

items.title: Triton: A Flexible Hardware Offloading Architecture for Accelerating Apsara vSwitch in Alibaba Cloud.
items.abstract:
Apsara vSwitch (AVS) is a per-host deployed forwarding component for instance network connectivity in the Alibaba Cloud. To meet the growing performance demands, we accelerated AVS by adopting the most widely used "Sep-path" offloading architecture, which introduces a separate hardware data path to speed up popular traffic. However, the deployment results prove that it is difficult to bridge the gap in performance and programming flexibility of the software and hardware data paths, resulting in unpredictable performance and low iteration velocity.

This paper introduces Triton , a flexible hardware offloading architecture for accelerating AVS. Triton stands out with a unified data path, where each packet passes serially through software and hardware processing to ensure predictable performance. For flexibility, Triton implements an elegant workload distribution model, which offloads generic tasks to hardware but maintains dynamic logic in software. Additionally, Triton integrates a series of cutting-edge software-hardware co-designs, including vector packet processing and header-payload slicing, to mitigate software bottlenecks and enhance forwarding efficiency. The deployment results compared to our prior solution based on "Sep-path" reveal that Triton achieves predictable high bandwidth and packet rate, and notably improves the connection establishment rate by 72%, with only 2 μs increase in latency. More importantly, the flexibility and iteration velocity of the software in Triton will save development costs and bolster maintenance efficiency for cloud vendors.
items.abstract_zh:
Apsara vSwitch (AVS) 是一个按主机部署的转发组件，用于阿里云中的实例网络连接。为了满足不断增长的性能需求，我们通过采用最广泛使用的“Sep-path”卸载架构来加速AVS，该架构引入了单独的硬件数据路径来加速流行流量。然而部署结果证明，软硬件数据路径的性能和编程灵活性之间的差距很难弥合，导致性能不可预测且迭代速度低。

本文介绍了 Triton，一种用于加速 AVS 的灵活硬件卸载架构。 Triton 凭借统一的数据路径而脱颖而出，其中每个数据包串行通过软件和硬件处理，以确保可预测的性能。为了灵活性，Triton 实现了一个优雅的工作负载分配模型，它将通用任务卸载到硬件，但在软件中保持动态逻辑。此外，Triton还集成了一系列尖端的软硬件协同设计，包括矢量包处理和头部有效负载切片，以缓解软件瓶颈并提高转发效率。与我们之前基于“Sep-path”的解决方案相比，部署结果表明，Triton 实现了可预测的高带宽和数据包速率，并且连接建立率显着提高了 72%，延迟仅增加了 2 μs。更重要的是，Triton软件的灵活性和迭代速度将为云供应商节省开发成本并提高维护效率。

items.title: m3: Accurate Flow-Level Performance Estimation using Machine Learning.
items.abstract:
Data center network operators often need accurate estimates of aggregate network performance. Unfortunately, existing methods for estimating aggregate network statistics are either inaccurate or too slow to be practical at the data center scale.

In this paper, we develop and evaluate a scale-free, fast, and accurate model for estimating data center network tail latency performance for a given workload, topology, and network configuration. First, we show that path-level simulations---simulations of traffic that intersects a given path---produce almost the same aggregate statistics as full network-wide packet-level simulations. We use a simple and fast flow-level fluid simulation in a novel way to capture and summarize essential elements of the path workload, including the effect of cross-traffic on flows on that path. We use this coarse simulation as input to a machine-learning model to predict path-level behavior, and run it on a sample of paths to produce accurate network-wide estimates. Our model generalizes over the choice of congestion control (CC) protocol, CC protocol parameters, and routing. Relative to Parsimon, a state-of-the-art system for rapidly estimating aggregate network tail latency, our approach is significantly faster (5.7×), more accurate (45.9% less error), and more robust.
items.abstract_zh:
数据中心网络运营商通常需要准确估计总体网络性能。不幸的是，现有的估计聚合网络统计数据的方法要么不准确，要么太慢，无法在数据中心规模上实用。

在本文中，我们开发并评估了一个无标度、快速且准确的模型，用于估计给定工作负载、拓扑和网络配置的数据中心网络尾部延迟性能。首先，我们表明路径级模拟（与给定路径相交的流量的模拟）产生与全网络范围的数据包级模拟几乎相同的聚合统计数据。我们以一种新颖的方式使用简单快速的流级流体模拟来捕获和总结路径工作负载的基本要素，包括交叉流量对该路径上流的影响。我们使用这种粗略模拟作为机器学习模型的输入来预测路径级行为，并在路径样本上运行它以产生准确的网络范围估计。我们的模型概括了拥塞控制 (CC) 协议、CC 协议参数和路由的选择。相对于 Parsimon（一种用于快速估计聚合网络尾部延迟的最先进系统），我们的方法明显更快（5.7 倍）、更准确（误差减少 45.9%）且更稳健。

items.title: A General and Efficient Approach to Verifying Traffic Load Properties under Arbitrary k Failures.
items.abstract: This paper presents YU, the first verification system for checking traffic load properties under arbitrary failure scenarios that can scale to production Wide Area Networks (WANs). Building a practical YU requires us to address two challenges in terms of generality and efficiency. The state-of-the-art efforts either assume shortest-path-based forwarding ( e.g. , QARC) or only target single-failure reasoning ( e.g. , Jingubang). As a result, the former inherently cannot generalize to widely used protocols ( e.g. , SR and iBGP) that are beyond shortest-path forwarding, while the latter cannot efficiently handle arbitrary failure scenarios. For the generality challenge, we propose an approach inspired by symbolic execution, called symbolic traffic execution, to model the forwarding behavior of a range of practically deployed protocols ( e.g. , eBGP, iBGP, iGP, and SR) under failure scenarios. For the efficiency challenge, we propose diverse equivalence classification techniques ( i.e. , k-failure-equivalence and link-local-equivalence reduction) to reduce the symbolic traffic execution overhead caused by both the large size of the production WAN and the huge number of traffic flows traversing it. YU has been used in the daily verification of our WAN for several months and has successfully identified potential failure scenarios that would lead to traffic load violations.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 YU，这是第一个用于在任意故障场景下检查流量负载属性的验证系统，该系统可以扩展到生产广域网 (WAN)。建设实用型YU需要我们解决通用性和效率两个方面的挑战。最先进的工作要么假设基于最短路径的转发（例如，QARC），要么仅针对单一故障推理（例如，Jingubang）。因此，前者本质上无法推广到最短路径转发之外的广泛使用的协议（例如 SR 和 iBGP），而后者则无法有效地处理任意故障场景。针对通用性挑战，我们提出了一种受符号执行启发的方法，称为符号流量执行，对一系列实际部署的协议（例如 eBGP、iBGP、iGP 和 SR）在故障场景下的转发行为进行建模。针对效率挑战，我们提出了多种等价分类技术（即 k 故障等价和链路本地等价缩减），以减少因生产 WAN 规模大和流经其的大量流量而导致的符号流量执行开销。 YU 已用于我们 WAN 的日常验证几个月，并成功识别出可能导致流量负载违规的潜在故障场景。

items.title: Accelerating Model Training in Multi-cluster Environments with Consumer-grade GPUs.
items.abstract: Rapid advances in machine learning necessitate significant computing power and memory for training, which is accessible only to large corporations today. Small-scale players like academics often only have consumer-grade GPU clusters locally and can afford cloud GPU instances to a limited extent. However, training performance significantly degrades in this multi-cluster setting. In this paper, we identify unique opportunities to accelerate training and propose StellaTrain, a holistic framework that achieves near-optimal training speeds in multi-cloud environments. StellaTrain dynamically adapts a combination of acceleration techniques to minimize time-to-accuracy in model training. StellaTrain introduces novel acceleration techniques such as cache-aware gradient compression and a CPU-based sparse optimizer to maximize GPU utilization and optimize the training pipeline. With the optimized pipeline, StellaTrain holistically determines the training configurations to optimize the total training time. We show that StellaTrain achieves up to 104× speedup over PyTorch DDP in inter-cluster settings by adapting training configurations to fluctuating dynamic network bandwidth. StellaTrain demonstrates that we can cope with the scarce network bandwidth through systematic optimization, achieving up to 257.3× and 78.1× speed-ups on the network bandwidths of 100 Mbps and 500 Mbps, respectively. Finally, StellaTrain enables efficient co-training using on-premises and cloud clusters to reduce costs by 64.5% in conjunction with a reduced training time of 28.9%.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习的快速发展需要大量的计算能力和内存来进行训练，而目前只有大公司才能获得这些能力。像学术机构这样的小规模参与者通常只在本地拥有消费级 GPU 集群，并且能够在有限的范围内负担云 GPU 实例。然而，在这种多集群设置中，训练性能显着下降。在本文中，我们确定了加速训练的独特机会，并提出了 StellaTrain，这是一个在多云环境中实现接近最佳训练速度的整体框架。 StellaTrain 动态调整加速技术的组合，以最大限度地缩短模型训练的准确时间。 StellaTrain 引入了新颖的加速技术，例如缓存感知梯度压缩和基于 CPU 的稀疏优化器，以最大限度地提高 GPU 利用率并优化训练管道。通过优化的管道，StellaTrain 整体确定训练配置以优化总训练时间。我们表明，通过调整训练配置以适应波动的动态网络带宽，StellaTrain 在集群间设置中比 PyTorch DDP 实现了高达 104 倍的加速。 StellaTrain 证明，我们可以通过系统优化来应对稀缺的网络带宽，在 100 Mbps 和 500 Mbps 的网络带宽上分别实现高达 257.3 倍和 78.1 倍的提速。最后，StellaTrain 能够使用本地和云集群进行高效的协同训练，从而将成本降低 64.5%，同时将训练时间缩短 28.9%。

items.title: Rethinking Machine Learning Collective Communication as a Multi-Commodity Flow Problem.
items.abstract: Cloud operators utilize collective communication optimizers to enhance the efficiency of the single-tenant, centrally managed training clusters they manage. However, current optimizers struggle to scale for such use cases and often compromise solution quality for scalability. Our solution, TE-CCL, adopts a traffic-engineering-based approach to collective communication. Compared to a state-of-the-art optimizer, TACCL, TE-CCL produced schedules with 2× better performance on topologies TACCL supports (and its solver took a similar amount of time as TACCL's heuristic-based approach). TECCL additionally scales to larger topologies than TACCL. On our GPU testbed, TE-CCL outperformed TACCL by 2.14× and RCCL by 3.18× in terms of algorithm bandwidth.
items.abstract_zh: 云运营商利用集体通信优化器来提高他们管理的单租户集中管理培训集群的效率。然而，当前的优化器很难针对此类用例进行扩展，并且经常会为了可扩展性而牺牲解决方案的质量。我们的解决方案TE-CCL采用基于流量工程的方法进行集体通信。与最先进的优化器 TACCL 相比，TE-CCL 生成的调度表在 TACCL 支持的拓扑上性能提高了 2 倍（其求解器花费的时间与 TACCL 基于启发式的方法相似）。 TECCL 还可以扩展到比 TACCL 更大的拓扑。在我们的 GPU 测试台上，就算法带宽而言，TE-CCL 的性能优于 TACCL 2.14 倍，优于 RCCL 3.18 倍。

items.title: CacheGen: KV Cache Compression and Streaming for Fast Large Language Model Serving.
items.abstract:
As large language models (LLMs) take on complex tasks, their inputs are supplemented with longer contexts that incorporate domain knowledge. Yet using long contexts is challenging as nothing can be generated until the whole context is processed by the LLM. While the context-processing delay can be reduced by reusing the KV cache of a context across different inputs, fetching the KV cache, which contains large tensors, over the network can cause high extra network delays.

CacheGen is a fast context-loading module for LLM systems. First, CacheGen uses a custom tensor encoder, leveraging KV cache's distributional properties to encode a KV cache into more compact bitstream representations with negligible decoding overhead, to save bandwidth usage. Second, CacheGen adapts the compression level of different parts of a KV cache to cope with changes in available bandwidth, in order to maintain low context-loading delay and high generation quality. We test CacheGen on popular LLMs and datasets. Compared to the recent systems that reuse the KV cache, CacheGen reduces the KV cache size by 3.5--4.3x and the total delay in fetching and processing contexts by 3.2--3.7x with negligible impact on the LLM response quality. Our code is at: https://github.com/UChi-JCL/CacheGen.
items.abstract_zh:
随着大型语言模型 (LLM) 承担复杂的任务，它们的输入会得到包含领域知识的较长上下文的补充。然而，使用长上下文具有挑战性，因为在法学硕士处理整个上下文之前，无法生成任何内容。虽然可以通过在不同输入之间重用上下文的 KV 缓存来减少上下文处理延迟，但通过网络获取包含大张量的 KV 缓存可能会导致较高的额外网络延迟。

CacheGen 是 LLM 系统的快速上下文加载模块。首先，CacheGen 使用自定义张量编码器，利用 KV 缓存的分布式属性将 KV 缓存编码为更紧凑的比特流表示形式，解码开销可以忽略不计，以节省带宽使用。其次，CacheGen 会调整 KV 缓存不同部分的压缩级别来应对可用带宽的变化，以保持低上下文加载延迟和高生成质量。我们在流行的法学硕士和数据集上测试 CacheGen。与最近重用 KV 缓存的系统相比，CacheGen 将 KV 缓存大小减少了 3.5--4.3 倍，将获取和处理上下文的总延迟减少了 3.2--3.7 倍，对 LLM 响应质量的影响可以忽略不计。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/UCi-JCL/CacheGen。

items.title: FIGRET: Fine-Grained Robustness-Enhanced Traffic Engineering.
items.abstract: Traffic Engineering (TE) is critical for improving network performance and reliability. A key challenge in TE is the management of sudden traffic bursts. Existing TE schemes either do not handle traffic bursts or uniformly guard against traffic bursts, thereby facing difficulties in achieving a balance between normal-case performance and burst-case performance. To address this issue, we introduce FIGRET, a Fine-Grained Robustness-Enhanced TE scheme. FIGRET offers a novel approach to TE by providing varying levels of robustness enhancements, customized according to the distinct traffic characteristics of various source-destination pairs. By leveraging a burst-aware loss function and deep learning techniques, FIGRET is capable of generating high-quality TE solutions efficiently. Our evaluations of real-world production networks, including Wide Area Networks and data centers, demonstrate that FIGRET significantly outperforms existing TE schemes. Compared to the TE scheme currently deployed in Google's Jupiter data center networks, FIGRET achieves a 9%-34% reduction in average Maximum Link Utilization and improves solution speed by 35×-1800×. Against DOTE, a state-of-the-art deep learning-based TE method, FIGRET substantially lowers the occurrence of significant congestion events triggered by traffic bursts by 41%-53.9% in topologies with high traffic dynamics.
items.abstract_zh: 流量工程 (TE) 对于提高网络性能和可靠性至关重要。 TE 的一个关键挑战是突发流量突发的管理。现有的TE方案要么不处理流量突发，要么统一防范流量突发，因此难以在正常情况下的性能和突发情况下的性能之间取得平衡。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了FIRET，一种细粒度鲁棒性增强的TE方案。 Figret 提供了一种新颖的 TE 方法，提供不同级别的鲁棒性增强，并根据各种源-目的地对的不同流量特征进行定制。通过利用突发感知损失函数和深度学习技术，FIRET 能够高效生成高质量的 TE 解决方案。我们对现实世界生产网络（包括广域网和数据中心）的评估表明，FIRET 显着优于现有的 TE 方案。与目前谷歌Jupiter数据中心网络中部署的TE方案相比，FIRET实现了平均最大链路利用率降低9%-34%，求解速度提高35×-1800×。与最先进的基于深度学习的 TE 方法 DOTE 相比，FIRET 在高流量动态拓扑中将流量突发触发的严重拥塞事件的发生率大幅降低了 41%-53.9%。

items.title: The Efficacy of the Connect America Fund in Addressing US Internet Access Inequities.
items.abstract: Residential fixed broadband internet access in the US remains inequitable, despite significant taxpayer investment. This paper evaluates the efficacy of the Connect America Fund (CAF), which subsidizes new broadband monopolies in underserved areas to provide internet access comparable to that in urban regions. CAF's oversight relies heavily on self-reported data from internet service providers (ISPs). Unfortunately, the reliability of this self-reported data has always been open to question. We use the broadband-plan querying tool (BQT) to create a novel dataset that complements ISP-reported information with ISP-advertised broadband plan details from publicly accessible websites for 537k residential addresses across 15 states. Our analysis reveals significant discrepancies, with a serviceability rate of only 55.45%, indicating that a significant fraction of addresses certified as served are still unserved. Furthermore, we observe a compliance rate of only 33.03%, indicating that a significant fraction of served addresses receive download speeds that are non-compliant with the FCC's 10 Mbps threshold for CAF-served addresses. Although we observe that CAF-served addresses occasionally receive higher download speeds than their monopoly-served neighbors, overall, the CAF program has largely failed to achieve its intended goal, leaving many targeted rural communities with inadequate or no broadband connectivity.
items.abstract_zh: 尽管纳税人进行了大量投资，但美国的住宅固定宽带互联网接入仍然不公平。本文评估了连通美国基金 (CAF) 的功效，该基金为服务欠缺地区的新宽带垄断企业提供补贴，以提供与城市地区相当的互联网接入。 CAF 的监督在很大程度上依赖于互联网服务提供商 (ISP) 的自我报告数据。不幸的是，这种自我报告数据的可靠性一直受到质疑。我们使用宽带计划查询工具 (BQT) 创建一个新颖的数据集，该数据集利用来自 15 个州的 537,000 个可公开访问网站的 ISP 公布的宽带计划详细信息来补充 ISP 报告的信息。我们的分析显示存在显着差异，服务可用率仅为 55.45%，这表明很大一部分经认证为服务的地址仍未得到服务。此外，我们观察到合规率仅为 33.03%，这表明很大一部分服务地址的下载速度不符合 FCC 对 CAF 服务地址的 10 Mbps 阈值。尽管我们观察到 CAF 服务的地址偶尔会比其垄断服务的邻居获得更高的下载速度，但总体而言，CAF 计划在很大程度上未能实现其预期目标，导致许多目标农村社区宽带连接不足或根本没有宽带连接。

items.title: IPD: Detecting Traffic Ingress Points at ISPs.
items.abstract:
Detecting where traffic enters a network enhances network operation, but poses a complex measurement problem that requires analyzing a continuous traffic stream from all border routers---a challenging task for ISPs in the absence of a scalable approach.

To enable ISPs to perform Ingress Point Detection ( IPD ), we propose an efficient approach that accurately identifies traffic ingress points at ISPs of any size using flow-level traffic traces. IPD identifies the specific router and interface through which a particular segment of the Internet address space enters a network. IPD splits the address space into fine-grained ranges to identify the specific router and interface through which segments of the address space enter the network. We have deployed IPD for six years at a major tier-1 ISP with an international network that handles multi-digit Tbit/s traffic levels, and our experience shows that IPD can accurately identify ingress points and scale to high traffic loads on a single commodity server. IPD enabled the ISP to improve network operations by identifying performance issues and realizing advanced traffic engineering practices.
items.abstract_zh:
检测流量进入网络的位置可以增强网络运行，但会带来复杂的测量问题，需要分析来自所有边界路由器的连续流量——在缺乏可扩展方法的情况下，这对于 ISP 来说是一项具有挑战性的任务。

为了使 ISP 能够执行入口点检测 (IPD)，我们提出了一种有效的方法，可以使用流级流量跟踪准确识别任何规模 ISP 的流量入口点。 IPD 标识特定的路由器和接口，互联网地址空间的特定段通过它们进入网络。 IPD 将地址空间分割为细粒度范围，以识别地址空间段进入网络的特定路由器和接口。我们已经在一家主要的一级 ISP 部署 IPD 六年了，该 ISP 拥有处理多位数 Tbit/s 流量水平的国际网络，我们的经验表明，IPD 可以准确识别入口点并扩展到单个商用服务器上的高流量负载。 IPD 使 ISP 通过识别性能问题和实现先进的流量工程实践来改善网络运营。

items.title: Realizing RotorNet: Toward Practical Microsecond Scale Optical Networking.
items.abstract: We describe our experience building and deploying a demand-oblivious optically-switched network based on the RotorNet and Opera architectures. We detail the design, manufacture, deployment, and end-to-end operation of a 128-port optical rotor switch along with supporting NIC hardware and host software. Using this prototype, we assess yield, synchronization, and interoperability with commodity hardware and software at a scale of practical relevance. We provide the first real-world measurements of Linux TCP throughput and host-to-host latency in an operational RotorNet, achieving 98% of link rate with 99th-percentile ping times faster than commodity packet-switching hardware. In the process, we uncover unexpected challenges with link-level dropouts and devise a novel and flexible way to address them. Our deployment experience demonstrates the feasibility of our implementation approach and identifies opportunities for future exploration.
items.abstract_zh: 我们描述了我们构建和部署基于 RotorNet 和 Opera 架构的无需求光交换网络的经验。我们详细介绍了 128 端口光学转子交换机的设计、制造、部署和端到端操作以及支持 NIC 硬件和主机软件。使用这个原型，我们在实际相关的范围内评估了产量、同步性以及与商品硬件和软件的互操作性。我们在运行的 RotorNet 中首次对 Linux TCP 吞吐量和主机到主机延迟进行了实际测量，实现了 98% 的链路速率，并且 ping 时间比商用数据包交换硬件快 99%。在此过程中，我们发现了链路级丢失带来的意外挑战，并设计了一种新颖且灵活的方法来解决这些问题。我们的部署经验证明了我们实施方法的可行性，并确定了未来探索的机会。

items.title: MegaTE: Extending WAN Traffic Engineering to Millions of Endpoints in Virtualized Cloud.
items.abstract: In today's virtualized cloud, containers and virtual machines (VMs) are prevailing methods to deploy applications with different tenant requirements. However, these requirements are at odds with the resource allocation capabilities of conventional networking stacks in wide-area networks (WANs). In particular, existing WAN traffic engineering (TE) systems at the granularity of aggregated traffic flows are not designed to cater to each individual flow. In this paper, we advocate for a radical new approach to extend TE systems to involve millions of virtual instance endpoints. We propose and implement a first-of-its-kind system, called MegaTE, to satisfy the needs of each fine-grained traffic flow at the virtual instance level. At the core of the MegaTE system is the paradigm shift from the top-down centralized control to the bottom-up asynchronous query in the TE control loop, combined with eBPF-based segment routing on the data plane and TE optimization contraction on the control plane. We evaluate MegaTE using flow-level simulations with production traffic traces. Our results show that MegaTE supports 20× more endpoints with the similar algorithm run time compared to prior work. MegaTE has been adopted by large-scale public cloud providers. Notably, Tencent rolled out MegaTE in its cloud WAN since December 2022. Our production analysis shows that MegaTE reduces the packet latency of real-time applications by up to 51%.
items.abstract_zh: 在当今的虚拟化云中，容器和虚拟机 (VM) 是部署具有不同租户需求的应用程序的流行方法。然而，这些要求与广域网 (WAN) 中传统网络堆栈的资源分配能力不一致。特别是，现有的以聚合流量为粒度的 WAN 流量工程 (TE) 系统并不是为了满足每个单独的流量而设计的。在本文中，我们提倡采用一种全新的方法来扩展 TE 系统以涉及数百万个虚拟实例端点。我们提出并实现了一个名为 MegaTE 的首创系统，以满足虚拟实例级别每个细粒度流量的需求。 MegaTE系统的核心是TE控制环路从自上而下的集中控制到自下而上的异步查询的范式转变，结合数据平面上基于eBPF的分段路由和控制平面上的TE优化收缩。我们使用流级模拟和生产流量跟踪来评估 MegaTE。我们的结果表明，与之前的工作相比，MegaTE 在相似的算法运行时间下支持多 20 倍的端点。 MegaTE已被大型公有云提供商采用。值得注意的是，腾讯自 2022 年 12 月起在其云广域网中推出了 MegaTE。我们的生产分析表明，MegaTE 将实时应用程序的数据包延迟降低了高达 51%。

items.title: Keeping an Eye on Congestion Control in the Wild with Nebby.
items.abstract: The Internet congestion control landscape is rapidly evolving. Since the introduction of BBR and the deployment of QUIC, it has become increasingly commonplace for companies to modify and implement their own congestion control algorithms (CCAs). To respond effectively to these developments, it is crucial to understand the state of CCA deployments in the wild. Unfortunately, existing CCA identification tools are not future-proof and do not work well with modern CCAs and encrypted protocols like QUIC. In this paper, we articulate the challenges in designing a future-proof CCA identification tool and propose a measurement methodology that directly addresses these challenges. The resulting measurement tool, called Nebby , can identify all the CCAs currently available in the Linux kernel and BBRv2 with an average accuracy of 96.7%. We found that among the Alexa Top 20k websites, the share of BBR has shrunk since 2019 and that only 8% of them responded to QUIC requests. Among these QUIC servers, CUBIC and BBR seem equally popular. We show that Nebby is extensible by extending it for Copa and an undocumented family of CCAs that is deployed by 6% of the measured websites, including major corporations like Hulu and Apple.
items.abstract_zh: 互联网拥塞控制领域正在迅速发展。自从引入 BBR 和部署 QUIC 以来，公司修改和实施自己的拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 已变得越来越普遍。为了有效应对这些发展，了解 CCA 的实际部署状况至关重要。遗憾的是，现有的 CCA 识别工具无法面向未来，并且不能与现代 CCA 和 QUIC 等加密协议很好地配合。在本文中，我们阐明了设计面向未来的 CCA 识别工具所面临的挑战，并提出了一种直接解决这些挑战的测量方法。由此产生的测量工具 Nebby 可以识别 Linux 内核和 BBRv2 中当前可用的所有 CCA，平均准确度为 96.7%。我们发现，在 Alexa Top 20k 网站中，BBR 的份额自 2019 年以来不断萎缩，只有 8% 的网站响应了 QUIC 请求。在这些 QUIC 服务器中，CUBIC 和 BBR 似乎同样受欢迎。我们通过将 Nebby 扩展到 Copa 和未记录的 CCA 系列来证明 Nebby 是可扩展的，该系列由 6% 的被测网站部署，包括 Hulu 和 Apple 等大公司。

items.title: Algorithms for In-Place, Consistent Network Update.
items.abstract:
Network configurations are regularly updated in response to issues such as congestion, failures, network changes, and modifications to security policies. We present a simple distributed algorithm for network update that operates on the fly and in place , and guarantees strong route-consistency. Existing methods are either weakly consistent, or do not operate in place and require excessive memory.

We prove that our method, called a causal update , appears to take effect instantaneously at a quiescent network state, even though it is actually carried out over time and interleaved with normal network operation. This property ensures per-packet consistency: i.e., a packet is processed either entirely within the old configuration or within the new one, never by a mix of the two. The price paid for these strong guarantees is that the algorithm may be forced to occasionally drop packets for consistency. We prove that forced drops cannot be avoided: any in-place and on-the-fly update method must drop packets or violate consistency. We show how to exploit network structure and update characteristics to reduce or entirely eliminate packet drops. Simulation experiments indicate that the (temporary) loss in throughput from forced packet drops falls within acceptable limits.
items.abstract_zh:
网络配置会定期更新，以应对拥塞、故障、网络变化和安全策略修改等问题。我们提出了一种简单的分布式网络更新算法，可以即时、就地运行，并保证强大的路由一致性。现有的方法要么是弱一致的，要么是操作不到位并且需要过多的内存。

我们证明，我们的方法（称为因果更新）似乎在静态网络状态下立即生效，尽管它实际上是随着时间的推移而执行的，并且与正常网络操作交织在一起。此属性确保每个数据包的一致性：即，数据包要么完全在旧配置中处理，要么在新配置中处理，而不是两者混合处理。这些强有力的保证所付出的代价是算法可能被迫偶尔丢弃数据包以保持一致性。我们证明强制丢弃是无法避免的：任何就地和动态更新方法都必须丢弃数据包或违反一致性。我们展示了如何利用网络结构和更新特征来减少或完全消除数据包丢失。模拟实验表明，强制丢包造成的（暂时）吞吐量损失落在可接受的限度内。

items.title: Integrated Two-way Radar Backscatter Communication and Sensing with Low-power IoT Tags.
items.abstract: Integrated Sensing and Communication (ISAC) represents an innovative paradigm for enhancing spectrum and hardware utilization for both sensing and communication. A specific type of ISAC, radar backscatter communication, involves low-power nodes embedding data onto radar signal reflections rather than generating new signals. However, existing radar backscatter techniques only facilitate uplink communication from the tag to the radar, neglecting downlink communication. This paper introduces BiScatter, an integrated radar backscatter communication and sensing system that enables simultaneous uplink and downlink backscatter communication, radar sensing, and backscatter localization. This is achieved through the design of chirp-slope-shift-keying modulation on top of Frequency Modulated Continuous Wave (FMCW) radars, complemented by passive differential circuitry at the backscatter tags for low-power decoding. BiScatter also presents a packet structure compatible with off-the-shelf radars that offer accurate data processing and synchronization between radar and tag. We prototype this backscatter network in both 9GHz and 24GHz, demonstrating its capability to extend across different frequency bands. Our evaluations demonstrate that BiScatter supports two-way backscatter communication with BER lower than 10 -3 up to 7m range and centimeter-level tag localization accuracy on top of off-the-shelf FMCW radars. The presented approach significantly augments the versatility and efficiency of ISAC for low-power devices.
items.abstract_zh: 集成传感和通信 (ISAC) 代表了增强传感和通信频谱和硬件利用率的创新范例。 ISAC 的一种特定类型，即雷达反向散射通信，涉及低功耗节点将数据嵌入到雷达信号反射上，而不是生成新信号。然而，现有的雷达反向散射技术仅促进从标签到雷达的上行链路通信，而忽略了下行链路通信。本文介绍了 BiScatter，这是一种集成的雷达反向散射通信和传感系统，可同时实现上行链路和下行链路反向散射通信、雷达传感和反向散射定位。这是通过在调频连续波 (FMCW) 雷达之上设计线性调频斜率移键控调制来实现的，并辅以反向散射标签上用于低功耗解码的无源差分电路。 BiScatter 还提供了与现成雷达兼容的数据包结构，可在雷达和标签之间提供准确的数据处理和同步。我们在 9GHz 和 24GHz 下制作了该反向散射网络原型，展示了其跨不同频段扩展的能力。我们的评估表明，BiScatter 支持双向反向散射通信，误码率低于 10 -3 ，范围可达 7m，并且在现成的 FMCW 雷达上具有厘米级标签定位精度。所提出的方法显着增强了低功耗设备 ISAC 的多功能性和效率。

items.title: An exabyte a day: throughput-oriented, large scale, managed data transfers with Effingo.
items.abstract: WAN bandwidth is never too broad --- and the speed of light stubbornly constant. These two fundamental constraints force globally-distributed systems to carefully replicate data close to where they are processed or served. A large organization owning such systems adds dimensions of complexity with ever-changing network topologies, strict requirements on failure domains, multiple competing transfers, and layers of software and hardware with multiple kinds of quotas. We present Effingo, a throughput-oriented, massively-parallel data copy service we built at Google. For its users, Effingo delivers high-throughput transfers with an scp-like interface. For Google, Effingo optimizes the network cost with a small footprint on datacenters. We experimentally show how Effingo achieves fairness and efficiency through copy tree optimization and dynamic adaptation to changing network conditions. On a typical day, Effingo transfers over an exabyte of data between dozens of clusters spread across continents and serves more than 10,000 users.
items.abstract_zh: 广域网带宽永远不会太宽——而且光速始终保持恒定。这两个基本限制迫使全球分布式系统小心地将数据复制到靠近数据处理或服务的位置。拥有此类系统的大型组织会因不断变化的网络拓扑、对故障域的严格要求、多个竞争传输以及具有多种配额的软件和硬件层而增加复杂性。我们推出 Effingo，这是我们在 Google 构建的一种面向吞吐量的大规模并行数据复制服务。对于用户来说，Effingo 通过类似 scp 的界面提供高吞吐量传输。对于 Google 来说，Effingo 优化了网络成本，并且在数据中心上占用空间很小。我们通过实验展示了 Effingo 如何通过复制树优化和动态适应不断变化的网络条件来实现公平性和效率。在典型的一天中，Effingo 在分布于各大洲的数十个集群之间传输超过 EB 的数据，并为 10,000 多名用户提供服务。

items.title: TopFull: An Adaptive Top-Down Overload Control for SLO-Oriented Microservices.
items.abstract:
Microservice has become a de facto standard for building large-scale cloud applications. Overload control is essential in preventing microservice failures and maintaining system performance under overloads. Although several approaches have been proposed, they are limited to mitigating the overload of individual microservices, lacking assessments of interdependent microservices and APIs.

This paper presents TopFull, an adaptive overload control at entry for microservices that leverages global observations to maximize throughput that meets service level objectives (i.e., goodput). TopFull makes adaptive load control on a per-API basis, exercises parallel control on each independent subset of microservices, and applies RL-based rate controllers that adjust the admitted rates of the APIs at entry according to the severity of overload. Our experiments on various open-source benchmarks demonstrate that TopFull significantly increases goodput in overload scenarios, outperforming DAGOR by 1.82x and Breakwater by 2.26x. Furthermore, the Kubernetes autoscaler with TopFull serves up to 3.91x more requests under traffic surge and tolerates traffic spikes with up to 57% fewer resources than the standalone Kubernetes autoscaler.
items.abstract_zh:
微服务已经成为构建大规模云应用程序的事实上的标准。过载控制对于防止微服务故障和在过载情况下维持系统性能至关重要。尽管已经提出了几种方法，但它们仅限于减轻单个微服务的过载，缺乏对相互依赖的微服务和 API 的评估。

本文介绍了 TopFull，这是一种微服务入口处的自适应过载控制，它利用全局观察来最大化吞吐量，以满足服务级别目标（即有效吞吐量）。 TopFull 对每个 API 进行自适应负载控制，对每个独立的微服务子集进行并行控制，并应用基于 RL 的速率控制器，根据过载的严重程度调整入口处 API 的准入速率。我们对各种开源基准测试的实验表明，TopFull 在过载情况下显着提高了吞吐量，比 DAGOR 快 1.82 倍，比 Breakwater 快 2.26 倍。此外，与独立的 Kubernetes 自动缩放器相比，具有 TopFull 的 Kubernetes 自动缩放器在流量激增的情况下可处理高达 3.91 倍的请求，并能以最多 57% 的资源来承受流量峰值。

items.title: Prudentia: Findings of an Internet Fairness Watchdog.
items.abstract: With the rise of heterogeneous congestion control algorithms and increasingly complex application control loops (e.g. adaptive bitrate algorithms), the Internet community has expressed growing concern that network bandwidth allocations are unfairly skewed, and that some Internet services are 'winners' at the expense of 'losing' services when competing over shared bottlenecks. In this paper, we provide the first study of fairness between live, end-to-end services with distinct workloads.
