Rather than focusing on individual components of an application stack (e.g., studying the fairness of an individual congestion control algorithm), we want to provide a direct study over real-world deployed applications. Among our findings, we observe that services typically achieve less-than-fair outcomes: on average, the 'losing' service achieves only 72% of its max-min fair share of link bandwidth. We also find that some services are significantly more contentious than others: for example, one popular file distribution service causes competing applications to obtain as low as 16% of their max-min fair share of bandwidth when competing in a moderately-constrained setting.
items.abstract_zh: 随着异构拥塞控制算法的兴起和日益复杂的应用控制循环（例如自适应比特率算法），互联网社区越来越担心网络带宽分配不公平，以及一些互联网服务在共享瓶颈竞争时以“失去”服务为代价成为“赢家”。在本文中，我们首次研究了具有不同工作负载的实时端到端服务之间的公平性。我们不想关注应用程序堆栈的各个组件（例如，研究单个拥塞控制算法的公平性），而是希望对实际部署的应用程序进行直接研究。在我们的研究结果中，我们观察到服务通常会实现不太公平的结果：平均而言，“失败”的服务仅实现其链路带宽最大-最小公平份额的 72%。我们还发现，某些服务比其他服务更具争议性：例如，一种流行的文件分发服务会导致竞争应用程序在适度受限的环境中竞争时获得低至其最大-最小公平带宽份额的 16%。

items.title: Alibaba HPN: A Data Center Network for Large Language Model Training.
items.abstract: This paper presents HPN, Alibaba Cloud's data center network for large language model (LLM) training. Due to the differences between LLMs and general cloud computing ( e.g. , in terms of traffic patterns and fault tolerance), traditional data center networks are not well-suited for LLM training. LLM training produces a small number of periodic, bursty flows ( e.g. , 400Gbps) on each host. This characteristic of LLM training predisposes Equal-Cost Multi-Path (ECMP) to hash polarization, causing issues such as uneven traffic distribution. HPN introduces a 2-tier, dual-plane architecture capable of interconnecting 15K GPUs within one Pod, typically accommodated by the traditional 3-tier Clos architecture. Such a new architecture design not only avoids hash polarization but also greatly reduces the search space for path selection. Another challenge in LLM training is that its requirement for GPUs to complete iterations in synchronization makes it more sensitive to singlepoint failure (typically occurring on ToR). HPN proposes a new dual-ToR design to replace the single-ToR in traditional data center networks. HPN has been deployed in our production for more than eight months. We share our experience in designing, and building HPN, as well as the operational lessons of HPN in production.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍 HPN，阿里云用于大语言模型 (LLM) 训练的数据中心网络。由于LLM和一般云计算之间的差异（例如，在流量模式和容错方面），传统的数据中心网络不太适合LLM训练。 LLM 训练在每个主机上产生少量周期性突发流（例如 400Gbps）。 LLM训练的这一特性使等价多路径（ECMP）容易出现哈希极化，从而导致流量分布不均匀等问题。 HPN 引入了一种 2 层双平面架构，能够在一个 Pod 内互连 15K GPU，通常由传统的 3 层 Clos 架构容纳。这种新的架构设计不仅避免了哈希极化，而且大大减少了路径选择的搜索空间。 LLM 训练的另一个挑战是它要求 GPU 同步完成迭代，这使得它对单点故障（通常发生在 ToR 上）更加敏感。 HPN提出了一种新的双ToR设计来取代传统数据中心网络中的单ToR。 HPN 已在我们的生产中部署了八个多月。我们分享设计和构建 HPN 的经验，以及 HPN 在生产中的操作经验。

items.title: Canal Mesh: A Cloud-Scale Sidecar-Free Multi-Tenant Service Mesh Architecture.
items.abstract:
In recent years, service mesh frameworks have gained significant popularity in building microservice-based applications. A key component of these frameworks is a proxy in each K8s pod, named sidecar, which handles inter-pod traffic. Our empirical measurement reveals that such per-pod sidecars cause numerous problems, including intrusion into the user pod, excessive resource occupation, significant overhead in managing many sidecars, and performance degradation caused by passing traffic through the sidecar.

In this paper, we introduce Canal Mesh , a cloud-scale sidecar-free multi-tenant service mesh architecture. Canal decouples service mesh functions from the user cluster and deploys a centralized mesh gateway in the public cloud to handle these functions, thus reducing user intrusion and orchestration overhead. Through service consolidation and multi-tenancy, the infra costs of service mesh are also reduced. To address the rising issues due to cloud-based deployment, such as service availability, tenant isolation, noisy neighbor, service elasticity, and additional infra costs, we leverage techniques including hierarchical failure recovery, shuffle sharding, rapid intervention, precise scaling, cloud infra reuse and resource aggregation, etc. Our evaluation shows that Canal Mesh's performance, resource consumption, and control plane overhead are significantly better than Istio and Ambient. We also share experiences from years of deploying Istio and Canal in production.
items.abstract_zh:
近年来，服务网格框架在构建基于微服务的应用程序中获得了广泛的欢迎。这些框架的一个关键组件是每个 K8s pod 中的代理，名为 sidecar，用于处理 pod 间的流量。我们的经验测量表明，这种 per-pod sidecar 会导致许多问题，包括入侵用户 pod、过度占用资源、管理许多 sidecar 的巨大开销以及通过 sidecar 传递流量导致的性能下降。

在本文中，我们介绍了 Canal Mesh，这是一种云规模的无 sidecar 多租户服务网格架构。 Canal 将服务网格功能与用户集群解耦，并在公有云中部署集中式网格网关来处理这些功能，从而减少用户入侵和编排开销。通过服务整合和多租户，服务网格的基础设施成本也降低了。为了解决云部署带来的服务可用性、租户隔离、嘈杂邻居、服务弹性和额外基础设施成本等问题，我们采用了分层故障恢复、洗牌分片、快速干预、精确扩展、云基础设施复用和资源聚合等技术。我们的评估表明，Canal Mesh 的性能、资源消耗和控制平面开销明显优于 Istio 和 Ambient。我们还分享了多年来在生产中部署 Istio 和 Canal 的经验。

items.title: PPT: A Pragmatic Transport for Datacenters.
items.abstract: This paper introduces PPT, a pragmatic transport that achieves comparable performance to proactive transports while maintaining good deployability as reactive transports. Our key idea is to run a low-priority control loop to leverage the available bandwidth left by the reactive transports. The main challenge is to send just enough packets to improve performance without harming the primary control loop. We combine two unconventional techniques: an intermittent loop initialization and an exponential window decrease, enabling us to dynamically identify and fill the spare bandwidth. We further complement PPT's design with a buffer-aware flow scheduling scheme to optimize the average FCT of small flows without prior knowledge of flow size information. We have implemented a PPT prototype in the Linux kernel with ~400 lines of code and demonstrated that compared to Homa, it delivers up to 46.3% lower overall average FCT and even 25%/55.5% lower average/tail FCT of small flows in an Memcached workload.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 PPT，这是一种实用的传输，它可以实现与主动传输相当的性能，同时保持响应式传输良好的可部署性。我们的关键想法是运行低优先级控制循环来利用反应式传输留下的可用带宽。主要挑战是发送足够的数据包以提高性能而不损害主控制环路。我们结合了两种非常规技术：间歇循环初始化和指数窗口减小，使我们能够动态识别和填充空闲带宽。我们通过缓冲区感知流调度方案进一步补充 PPT 的设计，以优化小流的平均 FCT，而无需事先了解流大小信息。我们在 Linux 内核中实现了大约 400 行代码的 PPT 原型，并证明与 Homa 相比，它的总体平均 FCT 降低了 46.3%，甚至 Memcached 工作负载中小流的平均/尾部 FCT 降低了 25%/55.5%。

items.title: Efficient Policy-Rich Rate Enforcement with Phantom Queues.
items.abstract: ISPs routinely rate-limit user traffic. In addition to correctly enforcing the desired rates, rate-limiting mechanisms must be able to support rich rate-sharing policies within each traffic aggregate (e.g. per-flow fairness, weighted fairness, and prioritization). This must be done at scale to support the vast magnitude of users efficiently. There are two primary rate-limiting mechanisms - traffic shaping (that buffers packets in queues to enforce the desired rates and policies) and traffic policing (that filters packets as per the desired rates without buffering them). Policers are lightweight and scalable but don't support rich policy enforcement and often provide poor rate enforcement (being notoriously hard to configure). Shapers, on the other hand, achieve desired rates and policies, but at the cost of high system resource (memory and CPU) utilization impacting scalability. This paper explores whether we can get the best of both worlds. We present our system BC-PQP, which augments a policer with (i) multiple phantom queues that simulate buffer occupancy using counters and enable rich policy enforcement, and (ii) a novel burst-control mechanism that enables auto-configuration of the queues for correct rate enforcement. Our system achieves the rate and policy enforcement properties close to that of a shaper with 7× higher efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: ISP 通常会对用户流量进行速率限制。除了正确执行所需的速率之外，速率限制机制还必须能够支持每个流量聚合内丰富的速率共享策略（例如每流公平性、加权公平性和优先级）。这必须大规模地完成，以有效地支持大量用户。有两种主要的速率限制机制 - 流量整形（在队列中缓冲数据包以强制执行所需的速率和策略）和流量监管（根据所需的速率过滤数据包而不缓冲它们）。监管器是轻量级且可扩展的，但不支持丰富的策略执行，并且通常提供较差的速率执行（众所周知，很难配置）。另一方面，Shapers 可以实现所需的速率和策略，但代价是系统资源（内存和 CPU）利用率较高，从而影响可扩展性。本文探讨了我们是否可以两全其美。我们提出了我们的系统 BC-PQP，它通过以下方式增强了监管器：(i) 多个虚拟队列，使用计数器模拟缓冲区占用情况并实现丰富的策略执行；(ii) 一种新颖的突发控制机制，可以自动配置队列以实现正确的速率执行。我们的系统的速率和策略执行特性接近整形器，但效率提高了 7 倍。

items.title: Understanding the Host Network.
items.abstract:
The host network integrates processor, memory, and peripheral interconnects to enable data transfer within the host. Several recent studies from production datacenters show that contention within the host network can have significant impact on end-to-end application performance. The goal of this paper is to build an in-depth understanding of such contention within the host network.

We present domain-by-domain credit-based flow control, a conceptual abstraction to study the host network. We show that the host network performs flow control over different domains (subnetworks within the host network). Different applications may traverse different domains, and may thus observe different performance degradation upon contention within the host network. Exploring the host network from this lens allows us to (1) near-precisely explain contention within the host network and its impact on networked applications observed in previous studies; and (2) discover new, previously unreported, regimes of contention within the host network.

More broadly, our study establishes that contention within the host network is not merely due to limited host network resources but rather due to the poor interplay between processor, memory, and peripheral interconnects within the host network. Moreover, contention within the host network has implications that are more far-reaching than the context of networked applications considered in previous studies: all our observations hold even when all applications are contained within a single host.
items.abstract_zh:
主机网络集成了处理器、存储器和外设互连，以实现主机内的数据传输。生产数据中心最近的几项研究表明，主机网络内的争用可能会对端到端应用程序性能产生重大影响。本文的目标是深入了解主机网络内的此类争用。

我们提出了逐域的基于信用的流量控制，这是研究主机网络的概念抽象。我们表明主机网络对不同域（主机网络内的子网）执行流量控制。不同的应用程序可能遍历不同的域，因此可能会在主机网络内发生争用时观察到不同的性能下降。从这个角度探索主机网络使我们能够（1）近乎精确地解释主机网络内的争用及其对先前研究中观察到的网络应用程序的影响； (2) 发现主机网络内新的、以前未报告的争用机制。

更广泛地说，我们的研究表明，主机网络内的争用不仅仅是由于主机网络资源有限，而是由于主机网络内处理器、内存和外设互连之间的相互作用较差。此外，主机网络内的争用比先前研究中考虑的网络应用程序的上下文具有更深远的影响：即使所有应用程序都包含在单个主机中，我们的所有观察结果仍然成立。

items.title: ConfMask: Enabling Privacy-Preserving Configuration Sharing via Anonymization.
items.abstract: Real-world network configurations play a critical role in network management and research tasks. While valuable, data holders often hesitate to share them due to business and privacy concerns. Existing methods are deficient in concealing the implicit information that can be inferred from configurations, such as topology and routing paths. To address this, we present ConfMask, a novel framework designed to systematically anonymize network topology and routing paths in configurations. Our approach tackles key privacy, utility, and scalability challenges, which arise from the strong dependency between different datasets and complex routing protocols. Our anonymization algorithm is scalable to large networks and effectively mitigates de-anonymization risk. Moreover, it maintains essential network properties such as reachability, waypointing and multi-path consistency, making it suitable for a wide range of downstream tasks. Compared to existing dataplane anonymization algorithm (i.e., NetHide), ConfMask reduces ~75% specification differences between the original and the anonymized networks.
items.abstract_zh: 现实世界的网络配置在网络管理和研究任务中发挥着至关重要的作用。虽然数据很有价值，但出于商业和隐私方面的考虑，数据持有者常常犹豫是否共享它们。现有方法不足以隐藏可以从配置推断出的隐式信息，例如拓扑和路由路径。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 ConfMask，这是一种新颖的框架，旨在系统地匿名化配置中的网络拓扑和路由路径。我们的方法解决了关键的隐私、实用性和可扩展性挑战，这些挑战是由不同数据集和复杂路由协议之间的强烈依赖性引起的。我们的匿名算法可扩展到大型网络，并有效降低去匿名化风险。此外，它还保持了基本的网络属性，例如可达性、路径指向和多路径一致性，使其适用于广泛的下游任务。与现有的数据平面匿名算法（即 NetHide）相比，ConfMask 减少了原始网络和匿名网络之间约 75% 的规范差异。

items.title: Expresso: Comprehensively Reasoning About External Routes Using Symbolic Simulation.
items.abstract: Existing network verifiers can efficiently identify failure-induced bugs. However, an equally-important concern is identification of external-routes-induced bugs, which has not been well addressed. Comprehensively reasoning about external routes is challenging, since each external neighbor can advertise an arbitrary set of routes, which is quite a huge space. This paper introduces a new network verifier, Expresso, which uses symbolic simulation to explore the equivalences in the space of external routes. We evaluate the effectiveness and scalability of Expresso on the WAN of a large cloud service provider and Internet2. Expresso found various property violations, some of which have already been confirmed by the operators. To the best of our knowledge, Expresso is the only verifier that can check the correctness of WANs amidst arbitrary external routes in a tractable amount of time, while other verifiers time-out after 1 day.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的网络验证器可以有效地识别故障引起的错误。然而，一个同样重要的问题是外部路由引起的错误的识别，该问题尚未得到很好的解决。全面推理外部路由具有挑战性，因为每个外部邻居可以通告任意一组路由，这是一个相当巨大的空间。本文介绍了一种新的网络验证器 Expresso，它使用符号模拟来探索外部路由空间中的等价性。我们评估 Expresso 在大型云服务提供商的 WAN 和 Internet2 上的有效性和可扩展性。 Expresso 发现了各种侵犯财产的行为，其中一些已经得到运营商的确认。据我们所知，Expresso 是唯一一个能够在易于处理的时间内检查任意外部路由中 WAN 正确性的验证器，而其他验证器则在 1 天后超时。

items.title: CCAnalyzer: An Efficient and Nearly-Passive Congestion Control Classifier.
items.abstract: We present CCAnalyzer, a novel classifier for deployed Internet congestion control algorithms (CCAs) which is more accurate, more generalizable, and more human-interpretable than prior classifiers. CCAnalyzer requires no knowledge of the underlying CCA algorithms, and it can identify when a CCA is novel - i.e. not in the training set. Furthermore, CCAnalyzer can cluster together servers it believes use the same novel/unknown algorithm. CCAnalyzer correctly identifies all 15 of the default Internet CCAs deployed with Linux, including BBRv1, which no existing classifier can do. Finally, CCAnalyzer can classify server CCAs while being as efficient or better than prior approaches in terms of bytes transferred and runtime. We conduct a measurement study using CCAnalyzer measuring the CCA for 5000+ websites. We find widespread deployment of BBRv1 at large CDNs, and demonstrate how our clustering technique can detect deployments of new algorithms as it discovers BBRv3 although BBRv3 is not in its training set.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了 CCAnalyzer，这是一种用于部署互联网拥塞控制算法 (CCA) 的新型分类器，它比以前的分类器更准确、更通用、更易于人类解释。 CCAnalyzer 不需要了解底层 CCA 算法，并且它可以识别 CCA 何时是新颖的 - 即不在训练集中。此外，CCAnalyzer 可以将它认为使用相同新颖/未知算法的服务器聚集在一起。 CCAnalyzer 正确识别了 Linux 部署的所有 15 个默认 Internet CCA，包括 BBRv1，这是现有分类器无法做到的。最后，CCAnalyzer 可以对服务器 CCA 进行分类，同时在传输字节数和运行时间方面与以前的方法一样高效甚至更好。我们使用 CCAnalyzer 进行了一项测量研究，测量了 5000 多个网站的 CCA。我们发现 BBRv1 在大型 CDN 中广泛部署，并演示了我们的集群技术如何在发现 BBRv3 时检测新算法的部署，尽管 BBRv3 不在其训练集中。

items.title: NetLLM: Adapting Large Language Models for Networking.
items.abstract:
Many networking tasks now employ deep learning (DL) to solve complex prediction and optimization problems. However, current design philosophy of DL-based algorithms entails intensive engineering overhead due to the manual design of deep neural networks (DNNs) for different networking tasks. Besides, DNNs tend to achieve poor generalization performance on unseen data distributions/environments.

Motivated by the recent success of large language models (LLMs), this work studies the LLM adaptation for networking to explore a more sustainable design philosophy. With the powerful pre-trained knowledge, the LLM is promising to serve as the foundation model to achieve "one model for all tasks" with even better performance and stronger generalization. In pursuit of this vision, we present NetLLM, the first framework that provides a coherent design to harness the powerful capabilities of LLMs with low efforts to solve networking problems. Specifically, NetLLM empowers the LLM to effectively process multimodal data in networking and efficiently generate task-specific answers. Besides, NetLLM drastically reduces the costs of fine-tuning the LLM to acquire domain knowledge for networking. Across three networking-related use cases - viewport prediction, adaptive bitrate streaming and cluster job scheduling, we showcase that the NetLLM-adapted LLM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms.
items.abstract_zh:
现在，许多网络任务都采用深度学习 (DL) 来解决复杂的预测和优化问题。然而，由于针对不同网络任务的深度神经网络（DNN）的手动设计，当前基于深度学习的算法的设计理念需要大量的工程开销。此外，DNN 在未见过的数据分布/环境上往往表现不佳。

受大型语言模型 (LLM) 最近成功的推动，这项工作研究了 LLM 对网络的适应，以探索更可持续的设计理念。凭借强大的预训练知识，LLM有望作为基础模型，实现“一个模型适用于所有任务”，具有更好的性能和更强的泛化能力。为了实现这一愿景，我们推出了 NetLLM，这是第一个提供连贯设计的框架，可以轻松利用 LLM 的强大功能来解决网络问题。具体来说，NetLLM 使法学硕士能够有效处理网络中的多模式数据并有效生成特定于任务的答案。此外，NetLLM 大大降低了微调 LLM 以获得网络领域知识的成本。在三个与网络相关的用例（视口预测、自适应比特率流和集群作业调度）中，我们展示了适应 NetLLM 的 LLM 显着优于最先进的算法。

items.title: MCCS: A Service-based Approach to Collective Communication for Multi-Tenant Cloud.
items.abstract: Performance of collective communication is critical for distributed systems. Using libraries to implement collective communication algorithms is not a good fit for a multi-tenant cloud environment because the tenant is not aware of the underlying physical network configuration or how other tenants use the shared cloud network---this lack of information prevents the library from selecting an optimal algorithm. In this paper, we explore a new approach for collective communication that more tightly integrates the implementation with the cloud network instead of the applications. We introduce MCCS, or Managed Collective Communication as a Service, which exposes traditional collective communication abstractions to applications while providing control and flexibility to the cloud provider for their implementations. Realizing MCCS involves overcoming several key challenges to integrate collective communication as part of the cloud network, including memory management of tenant GPU buffers, synchronizing changes to collective communication strategies, and supporting policies that involve cross-layer traffic optimization. Our evaluations show that MCCS improves tenant collective communication performance by up to 2.4× compared to one of the state-of-the-art collective communication libraries (NCCL), while adding more management features including dynamic algorithm adjustment, quality of service, and network-aware traffic engineering.
items.abstract_zh: 集体通信的性能对于分布式系统至关重要。使用图书馆来实现集体通信算法不太适合多租户云环境，因为租户不知道底层物理网络配置或其他租户如何使用共享云网络——这种信息的缺乏阻止了图书馆选择最佳算法。在本文中，我们探索了一种集体通信的新方法，该方法将实现与云网络而不是应用程序更紧密地集成。我们引入了 MCCS（托管集体通信即服务），它将传统的集体通信抽象公开给应用程序，同时为云提供商的实施提供控制和灵活性。实现 MCCS 需要克服几个关键挑战，将集体通信集成为云网络的一部分，包括租户 GPU 缓冲区的内存管理、同步集体通信策略的更改以及支持涉及跨层流量优化的策略。我们的评估表明，与最先进的集体通信库 (NCCL) 之一相比，MCCS 将租户集体通信性能提高了 2.4 倍，同时添加了更多管理功能，包括动态算法调整、服务质量和网络感知流量工程。

items.title: Relational Network Verification.
items.abstract:
Relational network verification is a new approach for validating network changes. In contrast to traditional network verification, which analyzes specifications for a single network snapshot, it analyzes specifications that capture similarities and differences between two network snapshots (e.g., pre- and post-change snapshots). Relational specifications are compact and precise because they focus on the flows and paths that change between snapshots and then simply mandate that all other network behaviors "stay the same", without enumerating them. To achieve similar guarantees, single-snapshot specifications would need to enumerate all flow and path behaviors that are not expected to change in order to enable checking that nothing has accidentally changed. Such specifications are proportional to network size, which makes them impractical to generate for many real-world networks.

We demonstrate the value of relational reasoning by developing Rela, a high-level relational specification language and verification tool for network changes. Rela compiles input specifications and network snapshot representations to finite state automata, and it then verifies compliance by checking automaton equivalence. Our experiments using data from a global backbone with over 10 3 routers find that Rela specifications need fewer than 10 terms for 93% of the complex, high-risk changes. Rela validates 80% of the changes within 20 minutes.
items.abstract_zh:
关系网络验证是一种验证网络更改的新方法。与分析单个网络快照规范的传统网络验证相反，它分析捕获两个网络快照（例如，更改前和更改后快照）之间的相似性和差异的规范。关系规范紧凑而精确，因为它们关注快照之间变化的流和路径，然后简单地要求所有其他网络行为“保持不变”，而不枚举它们。为了实现类似的保证，单快照规范需要枚举所有预计不会更改的流和路径行为，以便能够检查是否没有任何意外更改。此类规范与网络规模成正比，这使得为许多现实世界的网络生成它们是不切实际的。

我们通过开发 Rela（一种高级关系规范语言和网络变化验证工具）来展示关系推理的价值。 Rela 将输入规范和网络快照表示编译为有限状态自动机，然后通过检查自动机等效性来验证合规性。我们使用来自具有超过 10 3 个路由器的全球主干网的数据进行的实验发现，对于 93% 的复杂、高风险变更，Rela 规范只需要不到 10 个术语。 Rela 在 20 分钟内验证 80% 的更改。

items.title: Practical Rateless Set Reconciliation.
items.abstract: Set reconciliation, where two parties hold fixed-length bit strings and run a protocol to learn the strings they are missing from each other, is a fundamental task in many distributed systems. We present Rateless Invertible Bloom Lookup Tables (Rateless IBLTs), the first set reconciliation protocol, to the best of our knowledge, that achieves low computation cost and near-optimal communication cost across a wide range of scenarios: set differences of one to millions, bit strings of a few bytes to megabytes, and workloads injected by potential adversaries. Rateless IBLT is based on a novel encoder that incrementally encodes the set difference into an infinite stream of coded symbols, resembling rateless error-correcting codes. We compare Rateless IBLT with state-of-the-art set reconciliation schemes and demonstrate significant improvements. Rateless IBLT achieves 3--4× lower communication cost than non-rateless schemes with similar computation cost, and 2--2000× lower computation cost than schemes with similar communication cost. We show the real-world benefits of Rateless IBLT by applying it to synchronize the state of the Ethereum blockchain, and demonstrate 5.6× lower end-to-end completion time and 4.4× lower communication cost compared to the system used in production.
items.abstract_zh: 集合协调是许多分布式系统中的一项基本任务，其中两方持有固定长度的位字符串并运行协议来学习彼此丢失的字符串。据我们所知，我们提出了无速率可逆布隆查找表（Rateless IBLT），这是第一个集合协调协议，它在各种场景中实现了低计算成本和接近最优的通信成本：设置差异为一到数百万，位串为几字节到兆字节，以及潜在对手注入的工作负载。无速率 IBLT 基于一种新颖的编码器，该编码器将设置差异增量编码为无限的编码符号流，类似于无速率纠错码。我们将无比率 IBLT 与最先进的集合协调方案进行比较，并展示了显着的改进。无速率 IBLT 的通信成本比具有相似计算成本的非无速率方案低 3--4 倍，比具有相似通信成本的方案低 2--2000 倍。我们通过应用无速率 IBLT 来同步以太坊区块链的状态来展示其在现实世界中的优势，并证明与生产中使用的系统相比，端到端完成时间降低了 5.6 倍，通信成本降低了 4.4 倍。

items.title: P4runpro: Enabling Runtime Programmability for RMT Programmable Switches.
items.abstract: Programmable switches have revolutionized network operations by enabling the flexible customization of packet processing logic using language like P4. However, changing the programs running on the switch requires disturbing traffic and suspending other unrelated programs. In this paper, we present P4runpro, enabling runtime data plane updates with dynamic resource allocation. The P4runpro data plane abstracts hardware resources and defines dynamically reconfigurable atomic operations that form packet processing logic. P4runpro provides runtime programming interfaces called P4runpro primitives for the operator to write high-level programs. We have designed the P4runpro compiler to automatically and consistently link the P4runpro programs to the running data plane. We implement our prototype on a Tofino switch. We implement 15 example runtime programs using P4runpro to demonstrate its generality and expressiveness. Our evaluation results show that compared to the state-of-the-art, P4runpro can respond within hundreds of milliseconds, achieve an average of 60% to 80% dynamic resource utilization, concurrently run ≈0.6K to ≈2.8K programs, and introduce lower overhead. Our case studies illustrate the benefit of runtime programming and prove the same functionality between P4runpro and conventional P4 programs.
items.abstract_zh: 可编程交换机通过使用 P4 等语言实现数据包处理逻辑的灵活定制，彻底改变了网络操作。然而，更改交换机上运行的程序需要扰乱流量并暂停其他不相关的程序。在本文中，我们介绍了 P4runpro，它可以通过动态资源分配来实现运行时数据平面更新。 P4runpro 数据平面抽象硬件资源并定义形成数据包处理逻辑的动态可重新配置原子操作。 P4runpro 提供称为 P4runpro 原语的运行时编程接口，供操作员编写高级程序。我们设计了 P4runpro 编译器来自动、一致地将 P4runpro 程序链接到正在运行的数据平面。我们在 Tofino 交换机上实现了我们的原型。我们使用 P4runpro 实现了 15 个示例运行时程序，以展示其通用性和表现力。我们的评估结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，P4runpro可以在数百毫秒内响应，实现平均60％至80％的动态资源利用率，同时运行约0.6K至约2.8K程序，并引入较低的开销。我们的案例研究说明了运行时编程的好处，并证明 P4runpro 和传统 P4 程序之间具有相同的功能。

items.title: In-Network Address Caching for Virtual Networks.
items.abstract:
Packet routing in virtual networks requires virtual-to-physical address translation. The address mappings are updated by a single party, i.e., the network administrator, but they are read by multiple devices across the network when routing tenant packets. Existing approaches face an inherent read-write performance tradeoff: they either store these mappings in dedicated gateways for fast updates at the cost of slower forwarding or replicate them at end-hosts and suffer from slow updates.

SwitchV2P aims to escape this tradeoff by leveraging the network switches to transparently cache the address mappings while learning them from the traffic. SwitchV2P brings the mappings closer to the sender, thus reducing the first packet latency and translation overheads, while simultaneously enabling fast mapping updates, all without changing existing routing policies and deployed gateways. The topology-aware data-plane caching protocol allows the switches to transparently adapt to changing network conditions and varying in-switch memory capacity.

Our evaluation shows the benefits of in-network address mapping, including an up to 7.8× and 4.3× reduction in FCT and first packet latency respectively, and a substantial reduction in translation gateway load. Additionally, SwitchV2P achieves up to a 1.9× reduction in bandwidth overheads and requires order-of-magnitude fewer gateways for equivalent performance.
items.abstract_zh:
虚拟网络中的数据包路由需要虚拟到物理地址转换。地址映射由单方（即网络管理员）更新，但在路由租户数据包时由网络上的多个设备读取。现有方法面临着固有的读写性能权衡：它们要么将这些映射存储在专用网关中以实现快速更新，但代价是转发速度较慢，要么在终端主机上复制它们并遭受更新缓慢的影响。

SwitchV2P 旨在通过利用网络交换机透明地缓存地址映射，同时从流量中学习地址映射来避免这种权衡。 SwitchV2P 使映射更接近发送方，从而减少第一个数据包延迟和转换开销，同时实现快速映射更新，所有这些都无需更改现有路由策略和部署的网关。拓扑感知数据平面缓存协议允许交换机透明地适应不断变化的网络条件和变化的交换机内内存容量。

我们的评估显示了网络内地址映射的优势，包括 FCT 和第一个数据包延迟分别减少了 7.8 倍和 4.3 倍，以及转换网关负载大幅减少。此外，SwitchV2P 的带宽开销最多可减少 1.9 倍，并且实现同等性能所需的网关数量要少几个数量级。

items.title: vPIFO: Virtualized Packet Scheduler for Programmable Hierarchical Scheduling in High-Speed Networks.
items.abstract:
Programmable packet scheduling enables the integration of scheduling algorithms into switches without the need for hardware redesign. The Push-In First-Out (PIFO) queue facilitates a programmable packet scheduler, supporting a single scheduling algorithm flexibly. However, hierarchical scheduling required in Multi-Tenant Data Centers (MTDCs) remains non-programmable. Dynamic and diverse hierarchical scheduling algorithms necessitate alterations in both the number of PIFO queues and their connection topology, posing a significant challenge to support them on fixed hardware.

In this paper, we introduce the virtualized PIFO (vPIFO) system, a hardware virtualization solution for programmable hierarchical packet scheduling in MTDCs. The vPIFO system, leveraging a single physical PIFO, can flexibly establish PIFO Trees with diverse shapes, thereby enabling network operators to customize fine-grained traffic scheduling. We present a high-performance and large-scale hardware design for the vPIFO and implement a prototype on FPGA and ASIC. The synthesized results on GlobalFoundries 28nm technology showcase that vPIFO can flexibly support hierarchical scheduling within the scale of 128 PIFO instances while achieving an impressive speed of 400 Gbps with 6 levels of hierarchical scheduling. To the best of our knowledge, vPIFO is the first hardware virtualization work for packet schedulers to support accurate programmable hierarchical scheduling.
items.abstract_zh:
可编程数据包调度可以将调度算法集成到交换机中，而无需重新设计硬件。推入先出 (PIFO) 队列有利于可编程数据包调度程序，灵活支持单一调度算法。然而，多租户数据中心 (MTDC) 所需的分层调度仍然是不可编程的。动态且多样化的分层调度算法需要改变 PIFO 队列的数量及其连接拓扑，这对在固定硬件上支持它们提出了重大挑战。

在本文中，我们介绍了虚拟化 PIFO (vPIFO) 系统，这是一种用于 MTDC 中可编程分层数据包调度的硬件虚拟化解决方案。 vPIFO系统利用单个物理PIFO，可以灵活地建立各种形状的PIFO Tree，从而使网络运营商能够定制细粒度的流量调度。我们提出了 vPIFO 的高性能和大规模硬件设计，并在 FPGA 和 ASIC 上实现了原型。 GlobalFoundries 28nm 技术的综合结果表明，vPIFO 可以在 128 个 PIFO 实例的规模内灵活支持分层调度，同时通过 6 级分层调度实现 400 Gbps 的令人印象深刻的速度。据我们所知，vPIFO是第一个针对数据包调度器的硬件虚拟化工作，以支持精确的可编程分层调度。

items.title: μMon: Empowering Microsecond-level Network Monitoring with Wavelets.
items.abstract: Network monitoring is essential for network management and optimization. In modern data centers, fluctuations in flow rates and network congestion events ( e.g. , microbursts) typically manifest on a microsecond timescale. However, the time granularity of network monitoring systems has not been refined correspondingly to efficiently capture these behaviors. Attaining the monitoring granularity at the microsecond scale can greatly facilitate network performance analysis and management, but poses considerable challenges regarding memory, bandwidth, and deployment costs. We propose μMon, a novel microsecond-level network monitoring system for data centers. The key of μMon is WaveSketch, an innovative algorithm that measures and compresses flow rate curves using in-dataplane wavelet transform. WaveSketch allows for more accurate characterization of application traffic patterns and aids in profiling transport algorithms. Furthermore, by combining the fine-grained flow rate measurements with network-collected congestion information, μMon can 'replay' congestion events to analyze their cause and impact. We evaluate μMon through testbed deployment and simulations at a granularity of 8.192 μs. The evaluation results demonstrate that μMon can achieve a 90% accuracy in microsecond-level rate measurements with an average of 5 Mbps bandwidth overhead per host. Additionally, it can capture 99% heavy congestion events with 31--82 Mbps bandwidth overhead per switch.
items.abstract_zh: 网络监控对于网络管理和优化至关重要。在现代数据中心中，流量波动和网络拥塞事件（例如微突发）通常以微秒的时间尺度显现。然而，网络监控系统的时间粒度尚未相应细化，无法有效捕获这些行为。达到微秒级的监控粒度可以极大地方便网络性能分析和管理，但在内存、带宽和部署成本方面带来了相当大的挑战。我们提出了 μMon，一种新型的微秒级数据中心网络监控系统。 μMon 的关键是 WaveSketch，这是一种使用数据平面内小波变换测量和压缩流量曲线的创新算法。 WaveSketch 可以更准确地描述应用程序流量模式，并有助于分析传输算法。此外，通过将细粒度流量测量与网络收集的拥塞信息相结合，μMon 可以“重放”拥塞事件以分析其原因和影响。我们通过测试台部署和模拟以 8.192 μs 的粒度评估 μMon。评估结果表明，μMon 可以在微秒级速率测量中实现 90% 的精度，每个主机平均需要 5 Mbps 的带宽开销。此外，它可以捕获 99% 的严重拥塞事件，每个交换机的带宽开销为 31--82 Mbps。
